bullets: Kumquat is a small evergreen tree that is mostly wild in the mountains. It blooms and bears fruit every year. The fruit is oblate and slightly larger than peas. The peel is orange-yellow, the flesh is thin and juicy, the taste is bitter and the aroma is strong. MM

Select high-quality fresh kumquats, slice them evenly, and use a low-temperature baking process to lock in the ingredients and nutrients of the kumquats, and you can drink them directly after brewing.
Brewing method: Take 5-8 grams of kumquat slices, put it into a flower tea cup, pour in 300 ml of boiling water at about 90 degrees, and drink it in 3 minutes.

After the dried kumquat is soaked in water, the pulp fully absorbs water, the flesh is full, the soup is attractive, transparent and natural, the fruit is rich, the mouth has a long aftertaste, and the kumquat after soaking is as bright as before, giving you the taste of nature.

bullets: Premium Hand-Picked Kumquats Our kumquats are sourced from mountain-grown trees, known for their intense aroma and uniquely balanced bitter-sweet flavor profile. These small, potent fruits are harvested at their peak for maximum freshness.

Low-Temperature Drying Process We carefully slice and slow-dry premium kumquat fruits using a specialized low-temperature technique. This gentle process is designed to preserve the fruit's vibrant color, potent essential oils, and natural goodness.

Easy & Fragrant Brew Simply add 5-8 grams of these dried kumquat slices to a cup, pour in 300ml of hot water (around 90°C/194°F), and steep for 3 minutes. The result is an aromatic, golden-hued kumquat passion fruit drink tea that is both refreshing and invigorating.

Visually Appealing & Versatile When brewed, the dried kumquat slices plump up beautifully, creating an attractive, transparent liquor with a rich, fruity aroma. Enjoy it as a simple tea, or use the rehydrated slices as a flavorful garnish for desserts and cocktails.

Perfect for Tea & Creations Beyond a soothing tea, these dried citrus fruit slices are incredibly versatile. Use them to craft unique kumquat lemon passion fruit tea blends, infuse spirits, or simply enjoy them as a sophisticated, natural snack.

bullets: Blood Orange Loose Leaf Tea – Bright Citrus Herbal Tea - Our Blood Orange loose leaf tea blends real blood orange peel, hibiscus, and rose hips for a bold citrus flavor with balanced tart and naturally sweet notes. A vibrant herbal tea loose leaf blend that delivers a refreshing, full-bodied cup every time.

Caffeine Free Herbal Tea – Naturally Sugar Free - This caffeine free tea is made with 4 clean botanical ingredients and zero added sugar. A bright fruit tea loose leaf blend perfect as a citrus iced tea, afternoon refresher, or feel-good herbal tea alternative.

bullets: ORANGE TANGO DELIGHT: Prepare your taste buds for a dance of flavors with our Orange Tango Hibiscus Herbal Tea. Infused with the vibrant essence of oranges and a tangy finish, each sip is an invitation to a flavorful tango. Whether you prefer it hot or iced, savor the essence of summer with each delightful sip.

PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF TEA BLEND: Elevate your tea experience with our premium loose leaf tea blend, meticulously crafted with natural ingredients to ignite your senses. Embrace the opulent richness that you can see, smell, and savor, bidding adieu to disposable tea bags. Embark on a journey to uncover the remarkable Tiesta Tea difference, where quality and flavor converge in each cup.

DELIGHTFUL BLEND: Our loose leaf tea blends are nourishing concoctions of rooibos, herbal, and fruit teas, expertly crafted to provide your body with essential vitamins and nutrients. Embrace this blend as a natural way to support your overall well-being.

EFFORTLESS BREWING: Enjoy a hassle-free brewing experience with our Orange Tango Tea. Simply scoop 1.5 tsp of this delightful loose leaf tea blend for every 8 oz of hot water at 208 degrees Fahrenheit. Allow it to steep for 5-7 minutes to release the full spectrum of flavors. Then, savor the moment as you remove the tea pieces and indulge in your perfectly steeped cup.

SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to enhance your tea experience throughout the colder months. These seasonal favorites deliver a variety of flavors that are easy to brew and enjoy. Whether for personal use or shared during holiday gatherings, Tiesta Tea includes options that match different preferences and occasions.

important_information.Directions: Once you've got your loose leaf tea, grab your infuser and add your tea leaves to it. For best flavor for herbal tea, bring water to a boil (208°). Pour hot water over your leaves and let your tea steep for 3-5 minutes. Once the tea is done steeping, remove the leaves and enjoy. The longer you steep, the stronger flavor the tea will have.

bullets: TWIST OF LEMON: Bigelow's Lemon Lift Black Tea from the makers of Constant Comment offers a lemony twist to black tea. Try it hot or iced, plain or with sugar for a healthy citrusy drink any time of year. It's the perfect cup of tea for an afternoon.

INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Bigelow tea always come individually wrapped in foil pouches for peak flavor, freshness, and aroma to enjoy everywhere you go! Gluten -free, calorie-free, & Kosher certified; Bigelow tea delivers on all the health benefits of tea.

TRY EVERY FLAVOR: There's a Bigelow Tea for every mood and any time of day. Wake up in the morning with English Breakfast, enjoy an afternoon antioxidant boost from Green Tea, or relax & restore with one of our variety of caffeine free herbal teas.

AMERICAN MADE TEA: In 1945 Ruth Bigelow created our first tea, Constant Comment. Today, Bigelow is still Family Owned and American made. Bigelow Tea is a Certified B Corporation, a Zero Waste to Landfill company, & member of Ethical Tea Partnership.

UNCOMPROMISED QUALITY SINCE 1945: Bigelow has been a leader in premium tea. Compare our tea to Tazo, Stash, Celestial Seasonings, Harney & Sons, Lipton, Teavana, Numi, Taylors of Harrogate, Republic of Tea, Tetley and taste the difference.

item_details.Flavor: (44) Taste(20) Value for money(7) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Helaurin 5.0 out of 5 stars  Good flavor and perfect touch of lemon! Reviewed in the United States on January 21, 2025 Size: 80 Tea BagsVerified Purchase I'm happy I found this product. Here's the thing - I don't like coffee, but I do like tea. I especially like tea with lemon (and honey if available). So, at work, my employer has free coffee, hot chocolate, and an assorted teas. One of those was Bigelow's "Lemon Lift", and I enjoy it at work, which is fine. However, I wanted to be able to enjoy the same, or similar, convenience of a black tea with lemon at home. So, I hit my local stores.... and no one had anything like it. So, I hop on Amazon, first searching for the "Lemon Lift" - and up popped this Lipton Black Tea with Lemon as an similar, but alternative, product. Pricewise, it was better than the Bigelow product, so what the heck, I took a chance and ordered this Lipton Black Tea with Lemon. It's great! It is definitely at least as good as what I get at work, and it might actually be better! Interestingly, I'm finding that each tea bag actually is strong enough to generally make two decent mugs of tea, so it's even more cost-effective than I'd hoped for. The tea bags that Lipton uses for this are cute pyramid-shaped bags, instead of the flat ones. That also enhances the tea - apparently the shape allows for the tea to better expand during the steeping process, and has great brewing efficiency than round and square tea bags. In short - if you want black tea with lemon notes, and don't always have a fresh lemon to add, this is a great alternative. Read more 12 people found this helpful Helpful Report  roseanne gross 5.0 out of 5 stars  Absolutely delicious! Reviewed in the United States on February 13, 2026 Size: 80 Tea BagsVerified Purchase Absolutely delicious! You can really taste the lemon, but it's not tart, just so smooth. Some teas and coffees are too acidic and upset my stomach, but not this tea. bullets: LEMON CITRUS BLACK TEA : Introducing our Lemon Citrus Black Tea, a refreshing twist on the classic iced tea flavor. Elevate your daily tea ritual with the zesty allure of lemon-infused goodness. The bright citrusy notes harmonize flawlessly with our top-tier loose leaf black tea. Enjoy it hot or refreshingly iced, and relish the essence of summer with every sip.

PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF TEA BLEND: Elevate your tea ritual with our meticulously crafted premium loose leaf blend. We've carefully sourced the finest natural ingredients, including premium Black Tea Assam, Lemon pieces with pulp organi to awaken your senses. As you bid farewell to disposable tea bags, you'll embrace the opulent richness that's visible in the vibrant tea leaves, aromatic in its scent, and truly savored in each cup.

REUSABLE TEA TIN FOR TEA LOVERS: Our charming and reusable tin is the perfect gift for tea enthusiasts. Offering airtight storage, it ensures that your black loose leaf tea remains cozy and fresh for 40-50 cups. Not only a functional addition to your tea collection, but it also sits beautifully on your countertop, a testament to your passion for fine teas.

EFFORTLESS BREWING: Enjoy a hassle-free brewing experience with our lemon black loose leaf tea. Simply scoop 1.5 tsp of this delightful loose leaf tea blend for every 8 oz of hot water at 195 degrees Fahrenheit. Allow it to steep for 3-5 minutes to release the full spectrum of flavors. Then, savor the moment as you remove the tea leaves and indulge in your perfectly steeped cup. It's the ideal way to appreciate the rich and aromatic notes of our premium blend.

SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to enhance your tea experience throughout the colder months. These seasonal favorites deliver a variety of flavors that are easy to brew and enjoy. Whether for personal use or shared during holiday gatherings, Tiesta Tea includes options that match different preferences and occasions.

important_information.Directions: Once you've got your loose leaf tea, grab your infuser and add your tea leaves to it. For best flavor for chai tea, bring water to a boil (208°). Pour hot water over your leaves and let your tea steep for 3-5 minutes. Once the tea is done steeping, remove the leaves and enjoy. The longer you steep, the stronger flavor the tea will have.

bullets: DRINK IN LIFE: A box of 72 oversized tea bags with no strings, no tags, and no sweeteners to brew fresh, unsweetened Black Iced Tea by the glass or pitcher. Product makes 18 pitchers or 144 servings!

TASTING NOTES: A smooth and refreshing iced tea with the bright and citrusy flavour of lemon that's perfect for any time of day. Experience an exhilarating escape as you sip this brightly flavoured iced tea.
ONLY THE FINEST QUALITY INGREDIENTS: Black Tea, Natural Lemon Flavour with Other Natural Flavours

SIP & SAVOUR THE MOMENT: Enjoy by the Pitcher: Pour 4 cups boiling water over 4 tea bags in a clean heat-resistant pitcher, steep for 4 minutes, and remove tea bags. Fill the rest of the pitcher with ice or 4 cups of cold water. Enjoy now or refrigerate for later. Enjoy by the Glass: Pour boiling water over tea bag in a heat-resistant glass, steep for 4 minutes, and remove tea bag. Add ice to desired strength & enjoy!

bullets: Kumquat Lemon Passion Fruit tea ingredients are simple, only dried kumquat, passion fruit, lemon and rock sugar, without any additives. Each piece of dried kumquat and each piece of passion fruit is carefully selected to ensure that it is delicious

This fruit tea can be brewed cold or hot to meet your different drinking needs. When hot, the aroma of kumquat and the fruit flavor of passion fruit are fully released in hot water; When cold soaking, the fresh fruit smell will bring you a hint of coolness, especially suitable for hot summer

The packaging design of kumquat lemon passion fruit tea is simple, when brewing, just pour the fruit tea into the cup and add an appropriate amount of cold or hot water, wait for a few minutes, you can enjoy the delicious fruit tea. Whether at home, in the office, or on the road, this tea can provide you with a refreshing drink anytime, anywhere

Fruit tea combines dried kumquat with the flavor of passion fruit for a sweet and sour drink experience. Each bite feels fresh and vibrant, suitable for consumers of all ages, making it a good choice for your summer drink
Please soak in warm water below 60 degrees, too high water temperature will destroy the vitamin C nutrition in green orange passion fruit, and affect the taste

important_information.Directions: Soak in warm water below 60 degrees for a few minutes. For hot tea, pour the tea into a cup and add hot water. For cold tea, soak in cold water.

item_details.Flavor: Name: Kumquat Lemon TeaAmazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) I tried the Kumquat Lemon flavor. At time of my "test", there was only 1 posted review, stating it was sweet, but not strong flavor, so I doubled my quantity, and did NOT taste very much flavor. I usually like my tea sweet anyway, and based on the other review, I did not add additional flavor. Overall, the flavor was weak for me. Yet, it was not too sweet for me, as I like sweet. Next time, I will try 3 (three) bags to see if I get more flavor. I do tend to like my tea strong. Perhaps it is just a personal preference as to how strong of a flavor one prefers. Personally, I will not be purchasing or recommending. Best thing was the container. Has a screw off cap, but underneath a vacuum seal pull off tab to maintain freshness. bullets: ⭐This tea is composed of rock sugar, passion fruit, lemon, and kumquat, following the traditional recipe with a scientific ratio. The high-quality raw materials are carefully selected to ensure a fresh and delightful taste. The excellent quality of these ingredients is visibly evident. It comes in individual packaging, allowing for convenient and portable brewing, thus saving you precious time.

⭐The tea soup exudes a pure herbal aroma, presenting a mellow flavor with a subtle touch of sweetness.The dry tea exhibits a clear texture and uniform size. The herbs are dried while still in their fresh state, and a special process is employed to preserve the moisture of each herb, safeguarding their quality.

⭐Each type of herbal tea, with its characteristic aroma, is prepared in a dry form. During the brewing process, the tea leaves unfurl completely without any color change and can be brewed more than three times, allowing you to fully enjoy its flavor.We ensure that this tea is completely natural, free from any additives. We are committed to offering you the best-quality Chinese herbal tea, which is fresh and free from any strange odors.

⭐The rich fruity aroma of passion fruit is a prominent feature of this tea. When you gently sniff the tea soup, the first thing that hits your nostrils is the intense, tropical fragrance of passion fruit. It's like the fragrant scent of ripe fruits in a summer orchard, instantly energizing you. As you inhale deeper, the fresh citrus aroma of lemon and the sweet fruity scent of kumquat gradually blend in. The aroma of lemon is refreshing and pleasant, adding a touch of freshness to the overall tea aroma, as if bringing a sea breeze that dispels the summer heat. The fruity aroma of kumquat, on the other hand, is relatively sweeter and more mellow.
⭐️Each tea bag weighs 10g, and the total weight is 8.81oz (250g). You will receive 25 tea bags. The code printed on the box indicates the production date, and it has a shelf life of 18 months.

bullets: Elevating Sparkling Water - Bright and citrusy with a malty finish, Black Lemon is our creative spin on a classic

Black Lemon Tasting Notes - We combine our direct trade, heirloom variety black tea from the high mountain forests of the Golden Triangle in southeast Asia with zesty and floral California lemons and tangy, aromatic blackened lemons grown in the jungles of central Guatemala
Ingredients Sourced Directly From Artisan Growers - Black lemon is super energizing and quenches the palate with simplicity and sophistication

Sustainable Business is a Conscious Business - From the farmers we work with overseas to our manufacturing conditions at home, we are steadfast in following our code of ethics. bullets: WHAT IT IS: A refreshing white tea made with powerful plant ingredients to support digestion, calm everyday inflammation, balanced energy, and everyday wellness.

HELLO WELLNESS: Crafted with turmeric, elderberry, and antioxidants from green tea extract and blueberries, Happy Being brings nature’s best into every sip. With only 3g of natural sugar, no artificial ingredients, and just 20 calories, it’s designed to make feeling good, taste great.

HAPPY GUT, HAPPY YOU: Feeling good every day starts with digestion. That’s why Happy Being is crafted with thoughtfully selected, plant-based ingredients that help support gut health and keep you feeling good from the inside out.

CELLULAR ENERGY, WITHOUT CAFFEINE: Our white tea is rich in polyphenols and antioxidants to support your vitality—providing gentle, sustained cellular energy without caffeine. No jitters, no crashes—just balanced, feel-good energy all day long.

DELICIOUSLY GOOD FOR YOU: Bursting with juicy, refreshing flavors, our white tea blends are refreshingly irresistible. Every sip is crafted to be simple, nourishing, and delightfully delicious—because health should feel as good as it tastes.

FLAVOR YOU CAN TASTE This isn’t one of those hint-of-flavor sparkling waters. This is major flavor that will fruit up your taste buds

VITAMINS & ANTIOXIDANTS Even when your favorite flavor changes, you’ll still be drinking a Sparkling Ice with vitamins B6, B12, and E. Turns out having zero sugar means you’ve got room for better things
LOW CALORIE You can count how many calories there are on just one hand. Hint... it’s 5
12 BOTTLES So you can say your favorite flavor 12 times over with each multi-pack. The sparkle don’t stop, with 17 fl. oz. in each bottle
FLAVOR FOREVER The end of your flavor journey is inevitable. But the quenching memories last forever because your favorite flavor comes in a recyclable bottle

bullets: 【Authentic Lychee Infusion】Crafted via traditional low-temperature scenting, where handpicked lychees are layered with premium Yingde black tea leaves for 15+ hours, locking in a rich, natural fruit aroma that evokes fresh lychee orchards.

【Distinctive Loose Leaf Form】Boasts tightly twisted, glossy dark brown leaves with subtle reddish hues. When steeped, the leaves unfurl gracefully to reveal their full texture, releasing a vibrant amber-red infusion that showcases the tea’s quality.​

【Rich Flavor Spectrum】Offers a luminous ruby-red brew with a sweet, mellow taste – the natural lychee sweetness complements the black tea malty undertones, creating a smooth finish that lingers through multiple infusions. Each steep deepens the flavor, revealing new layers of fruit and tea complexity.​

【Brewing Made Simple】Use 3–4g of loose leaf tea per 150ml water heated to 195–205°F (90–96°C) for 2–3 minutes. Ideal for gaiwan, teapot, or glassware – perfect for both hot brewing and refreshing iced tea preparations.​

【Ideal for Every Occasion】A sophisticated choice for daily sipping, office breaks, afternoon tea, or gifting to tea enthusiasts. Comes in an airtight, resealable pouch to preserve the tea’s freshness, capturing the authentic taste of Guangdong’s tea heritage.

important_information.Directions: Instruction: Mix 30g of milk tea powder mix (2 tablespoon) with 50ml of hot water. Stir well until the powder is completely dissolved and set it aside to cool to room temperature. Top up with 200ml of hot/iced milk or other milk alternative. Stir well and enjoy!. Gentle Reminder: Due to the natural acidity of some flavors, milk curdling might occur when cold milk is added to hot drink or hot milk added to cold drink. After mixing the milk tea powder mix with hot water, we recommend to set it aside to cool to room temperature before adding hot/cold milk.

item_details.Flavor: Name: LycheeVerified Purchase I love going to local boba shops and getting lychee green tea with lychee jelly but it all starts to add up very quickly at around $6-9 a drink, location and inclusions dependent. I thought this would be a nice alternative for a make at home option as I easily adapted to at home coffee with a similar coffee product. This was so disappointing. First, the image on the original post looks like it's adding the powder directly into an iced drink - the box is in a language other than English and didn't not have a pasted instruction sheet so I followed the instructions from the similar product. This absolutely does not dissolve in cold water, even without the ice. Attempted to lessen the water and stir and it still clumped up before looking at the bottom of the cup in a cluster of undissolved powder. The smell is so convincing that it will taste like a lychee iced tea but it fell completely short. Will need to add lychee syrup to enhance the flavor. The container is cute, the concept is understandable as there are other similar (and good) products on the market, but this left so much to be desired. Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2024 Size: 32 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase This product is better than the matcha powder mix used at Starbucks! Starbucks uses a 51% sugar mix with questionably sourced matcha/sencha making up the other 49%. It has no tea flavor as it's basically just sweetened milk. If you've come to matcha through the Starbucks lens, this is NOT that product. It's what you should be drinking instead! When I've tried to get matcha powder locally at the grocery store, I've not been able to find one that is the same quality as this in such a value size quantity. For size reference, I'm pretty sure this size bag could last one person 3mos even if they were drinking a matcha latte everyday. This matcha here packs a bolder flavor, a better boost of energy, and more mental clarity without the crash that you'd have from coffee. It is unsweetened, which gives you the freedom to make the final product (latte, smoothie, whatever) as sweet or unsweet as you like. The powder is ULTRA fine, and is about the consistency of powdered sugar. It dissolves wonderfully in a few ounces of the liquid of your choice (I prefer oatmilk), and it suspends very nicely and does not sink to the bottom when at rest for a few moments. bullets: Micro Ingredients 100% fresh culinary grade matcha powder. A smooth tasting green tea powder that is derived from the young first harvest of this traditional Japanese tea plant. Using authentic early spring leaves to provide an earthy natural tasting matcha so you can add it to any of your favorite recipes or smoothies for enhanced flavor.

Matcha green tea is one of the most popular drinks in the world and Micro Ingredients offers the real deal. Providing a 1lb supply with 151 servings. A truly tasty raw matcha powder that is USDA organic.

This superfood plant is mainly used for its edible green leaves, which the whole leaf gets ground up to maximize potency and flavor. This allows for higher left over nutrients including caffeine and antioxidants. All you need to do is simply use the scoop we provide and you can start getting your matcha on.

Traditional matcha powder that you can enjoy in the comfort of your own home or take it on the go in your favorite drink. Micro ingredients fresh matcha green tea powder offers an all-natural flavor ground into a fine powder for easy mixing.

Authentic matcha powder that is not exposed to radiation and made without soy, dairy, gluten, and tree nuts. Ingredients must pass a 3rd party lab test to ensure our product is safe, pure, and potent.

It has that rich, deep green color and fresh aroma that tells you right away it’s high quality. The bag is generous in size for the price, and my most recent order even came with a little scoop on top, which was such a thoughtful touch! I like to mix mine with milk and honey for a creamy, delicious latte, and it dissolves beautifully in hot water without clumping. I usually make about 12 ounces at a time using the scoop provided and drink it two or three times a day. Helpful Report  Meric Kuhn 5.0 out of 5 stars  This is a better quality matcha than what is used at Starbucks! Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2024 Size: 32 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase This product is better than the matcha powder mix used at Starbucks! Starbucks uses a 51% sugar mix with questionably sourced matcha/sencha making up the other 49%. It has no tea flavor as it's basically just sweetened milk. If you've come to matcha through the Starbucks lens, this is NOT that product. It's what you should be drinking instead! When I've tried to get matcha powder locally at the grocery store, I've not been able to find one that is the same quality as this in such a value size quantity. For size reference, I'm pretty sure this size bag could last one person 3mos even if they were drinking a matcha latte everyday. This matcha here packs a bolder flavor, a better boost of energy, and more mental clarity without the crash that you'd have from coffee. It is unsweetened, which gives you the freedom to make the final product (latte, smoothie, whatever) as sweet or unsweet as you like. The powder is ULTRA fine, and is about the consistency of powdered sugar. It dissolves wonderfully in a few ounces of the liquid of your choice (I prefer oatmilk), and it suspends very nicely and does not sink to the bottom when at rest for a few moments. All around highly recommend. Unless you're Japanese and have had that real good stuff and would know the difference, this is probably good enough for most people. It makes things green. For all intents and purposes, this is enough for the typical matcha user. For those with a bit of an upturned nose to anything that's "inferior" to matcha, then this is not for you. By taste, this product is not as good on the tastebuds as, say, Jade Leaf. It doesn't do matcha justice and, in my opinion, does not mix that well when making lattes. In terms of color, this one is also paling in comparison when by itself, but when added to other things as a flavoring agent or colorant, then it does the job as well as it can. bullets: Micro Ingredients 100% fresh culinary grade matcha powder. A smooth tasting green tea powder that is derived from the young first harvest of this traditional Japanese tea plant. Using authentic early spring leaves to provide an earthy natural tasting matcha so you can add it to any of your favorite recipes or smoothies for enhanced flavor.

Matcha green tea is one of the most popular drinks in the world and Micro Ingredients offers the real deal. Providing a 2lb bulk supply with each serving containing 0 calories and over 300 servings. A truly tasty raw matcha powder that is organic certified and offers various health benefits besides flavor.

This superfood plant is mainly used for its edible green leaves, which the whole leaf gets ground up to maximize potency and flavor. This allows for higher left over components including caffeine and antioxidants. All you need to do is simply use the scoop we provide and you can start getting your matcha on.

Traditional matcha powder that you can enjoy in the comfort of your own home or take it on the go in your favorite drink. Micro ingredients fresh matcha green tea powder offers an all-natural flavor ground into a fine powder for easy mixing.

Authentic matcha powder that is not exposed to radiation and made without soy, dairy, gluten, and tree nuts. Ingredients must pass our 3rd party lab tests to ensure a product that is safe, pure, and potent.

bullets: ORGANIC MATCHA GREEN TEA POWDER: Our Culinary Grade Matcha is a versatile ingredient great for everything from smoothies, to baked goods to ice cream! This matcha powder, ground from second harvest tea leaves, adds a rich, distinctive flavor and beautiful color to all your favorite recipes.

AUTHENTIC JAPANESE MATCHA POWDER: Jade Leaf Matcha is pure shade-grown green tea leaf matcha powder - Grown Without Pesticides or Harmful Fertilizers, sourced directly from the pristine tea fields of Uji and Kagoshima, Japan.

BENEFITS: Our matcha green tea powder contains antioxidants which have been shown to promote overall health & wellbeing and has naturally occurring caffeine and L-theanine, believed to provide jitter-free energy without the crash.
FLAVOR PROFILE: Earthy, with Sweet Nutty & Umami Notes, and with 16-24mg of caffeine per serving, it's less caffeine than one quarter of an 8-ounce cup of coffee.

HOW TO USE: For baking and recipes, add 1 to 3 teaspoons of matcha per cup of flour to your favorite muffin, cake, pancake or other blended recipe. For beverages, start by making a matcha shot by mixing one half teaspoon of matcha powder with 2 ounces of water and combine with hot or cold water or milk to make a delicious drink!

bullets: ✓ Premium Japanese Ceremonial Grade Matcha, Fresh from Japan - Made from shade grown, First Harvest tea leaves from Uji Kyoto. The tencha is only ground into powder right before it leaves Japan for the USA, and then sealed into air-tight packets. This gets you extremely fresh, quality Uji matcha to be enjoyed right here in America.

✓ Smooth, Balanced And Versatile, Ideal For Matcha Beginners - This matcha ceremonial grade green tea powder is smooth with balanced umami with a just a tiny hint of bitterness. It is the perfect matcha for beginners looking to make matcha lattes, or matcha teas (usucha).We recommend using this for recipes where matcha is the main ingredient.

✓ Improve Your Focus, Boost Energy Without Coffee – Greatly increase your focus and energy by drinking Naoki Matcha. Unlike the typical caffeine rush from coffee, the amino acid L-theanine in Naoki Matcha moderates the effects of caffeine and helps to relax the mind and body while providing a steady boost of energy for up to 6 hours. Matcha is also naturally gluten and sugar free, and is a healthy source of antioxidants.

✓ We Want To Help You Enjoy Matcha – To ensure you have the best matcha experience, we provide our full guidance through directions for use, recipes and tips for enjoying it. Whether you like to drink matcha as a tea, or to mix it up as a latte or smoothie, we do not think there’s a right or wrong way to enjoy matcha. Our 1.4 oz / 40g tin serves a total of 20 servings. 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder makes either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte.

✓ Authentic Japanese Matcha From Uji – Uji is home to Japanese matcha culture and many of the tea estates have accumulated centuries of know-how and techniques. This blend of matcha is produced in Uji using these very same best practices.

important_information.Safety Information: Due to its caffeine content, it is advised that children and pregnant women avoid consuming this product. Ingredients Green Tea Leaves
important_information.Directions: 1. Use 1 teaspoon (2 grams) of Naoki Matcha powder for either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte. 2. For matcha tea, whisk the powder in hot water until frothy. 3. For matcha latte, mix the powder with steamed milk. 4. Enjoy your Naoki Matcha drink, which can help improve focus and boost energy without a coffee crash. 5. Follow the full guidance and tips for use provided by the manufacturer to ensure the best matcha experience.

bullets: CAFE STYLE MATCHA AT HOME: Our matcha latte blend is crafted by baristas with a balance of flavor and sweetness for you to make coffee shop matcha lattes at home. Make it your way with your favorite milk.

EASY TO MAKE: Just add two teaspoons of matcha latte mix with 1/4 cup of warm water. When mixed, combine with your favorite hot or cold milk and enjoy. For a true café experience, froth your milk first!

PREMIUM JAPANESE MATCHA: Authentically made of organic Japanese matcha, unrefined organic cane sugar and natural flavors. Our matcha latte blend is 100% USDA certified organic, plant based, gluten free, GMO-free, and delicious.
CAFFEINE: Matcha contains less caffeine than a standard 8oz cup of coffee while still giving you an energy boost to kick-start your day.

JADE LEAF MATCHA: Jade Leaf is proudly the #1 Matcha brand in the US*. We source our matcha directly from family owned partner farms across the Uji and Kagoshima regions. Our tea masters fuse traditional and modern techniques to cultivate leaves brimming with flavor and nutrients, creating well rounded flavor blends, not found anywhere else.

✓ We Want To Help You Enjoy Matcha – To ensure you have the best matcha experience, we provide our full guidance through directions for use, recipes and tips for enjoying it. Whether you like to drink matcha as a tea, or to mix it up as a latte or smoothie, we do not think there’s a right or wrong way to enjoy matcha. Our 3.5 oz / 100g tin serves a total of 50 servings. 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder makes either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte.

important_information.Safety Information: Don't drink green tea if you have a bleeding disorder. Heart conditions: When taken in large amounts, the caffeine in green tea might cause irregular heartbeat. Diabetes: The caffeine in green tea might affect blood sugar control. If you drink green tea and have diabetes, monitor your blood sugar carefully. Ingredients Matcha green tea powder
important_information.Directions: 1. Use 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder for either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte. 2. For usucha, whisk the matcha with 2.5 oz water until frothy. 3. For a matcha latte, use 1.5 oz water and carefully whisk until frothy. 4. Keep refrigerated once opened and aim to finish the tin within 1 - 2 months for the best experience.

HOW TO USE: For baking and recipes, add 1 to 3 teaspoons of matcha per cup of flour to your favorite muffin, cake, pancake or other blended recipe. For beverages, start by making a matcha shot by mixing one half teaspoon of matcha powder with 2 ounces of water and combine with hot or cold water or milk to make a delicious drink!

bullets: ✓ Our Superior Blend Ceremonial Grade Matcha in Larger Packaging - Bigger packaging that offers both convenience and even greater value! Our 3.5 oz / 100g package serves a total of 50 servings. 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder makes either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small of matcha latte.

✓ Premium Japanese Ceremonial Grade Matcha, Fresh from Japan - Made from shade grown, First Harvest tea leaves from Uji Kyoto. The tencha is only ground into powder right before it leaves Japan for the USA, and then sealed into air-tight packets. This gets you extremely fresh, quality Uji matcha to be enjoyed right here in America.

✓ Smooth, Balanced And Versatile, Ideal For Matcha Beginners - This matcha ceremonial grade green tea powder is smooth with balanced umami with a hint of bitterness. It is the perfect matcha for beginners looking to make matcha lattes or occasional matcha teas (usucha).We recommend using this for recipes where matcha is the main ingredient.

✓ Improve Your Focus, Boost Energy Without Coffee – Greatly increase your focus by drinking Naoki Matcha. Unlike the typical caffeine rush from coffee, the amino acid L-theanine in Naoki Matcha moderates the effects of caffeine and helps to relax the mind and body while providing a steady boost of energy for up to 6 hours. Matcha is also naturally gluten and sugar free, and is a healthy source of antioxidants.

✓ We Want To Help You Enjoy Matcha – To ensure you have the best matcha experience, we provide our full guidance through directions for use, recipes and tips for enjoying it. Whether you like to drink matcha as a tea, or to mix it up as a latte or smoothie, we do not think there’s a right or wrong way to enjoy matcha. Our 3.5 oz / 100g tin serves a total of 50 servings. 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder makes either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte.

important_information.Safety Information: Don't drink green tea if you have a bleeding disorder. Heart conditions: When taken in large amounts, the caffeine in green tea might cause irregular heartbeat. Diabetes: The caffeine in green tea might affect blood sugar control. If you drink green tea and have diabetes, monitor your blood sugar carefully. Ingredients Matcha green tea powder
important_information.Directions: 1. Use 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder for either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte. 2. For usucha, whisk the matcha with 2.5 oz water until frothy. 3. For a matcha latte, use 1.5 oz water and carefully whisk until frothy. 4. Keep refrigerated once opened and aim to finish the tin within 1 - 2 months for the best experience.

bullets: ORGANIC MATCHA TEA - The tea is filled into tea bags and packed into foil-lined kraft bags in California

100 ECO-CONSCIOUS TEA BAGS - Our premium tea bags are constructed of Abacá Hemp Fiber Paper. They are free of dyes, adhesive, glue and chlorine bleach. No staples, strings, bags or extra waste - just delicious tea!
CERTIFIED USDA ORGANIC - All our products are certified USDA Organic by California Certified Organic Farmers (CCOF), a leader in organic certification. Look for the USDA Organic seal on our products!

Reviewed in the United States on April 25, 2024 Size: 32 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase This product is better than the matcha powder mix used at Starbucks! Starbucks uses a 51% sugar mix with questionably sourced matcha/sencha making up the other 49%. It has no tea flavor as it's basically just sweetened milk. If you've come to matcha through the Starbucks lens, this is NOT that product. It's what you should be drinking instead! When I've tried to get matcha powder locally at the grocery store, I've not been able to find one that is the same quality as this in such a value size quantity. For size reference, I'm pretty sure this size bag could last one person 3mos even if they were drinking a matcha latte everyday. This matcha here packs a bolder flavor, a better boost of energy, and more mental clarity without the crash that you'd have from coffee. It is unsweetened, which gives you the freedom to make the final product (latte, smoothie, whatever) as sweet or unsweet as you like. The powder is ULTRA fine, and is about the consistency of powdered sugar. It dissolves wonderfully in a few ounces of the liquid of your choice (I prefer oatmilk), and it suspends very nicely and does not sink to the bottom when at rest for a few moments. bullets: Micro Ingredients 100% fresh culinary grade matcha powder. A smooth tasting green tea powder that is derived from the young first harvest of this traditional Japanese tea plant. Using authentic early spring leaves to provide an earthy natural tasting matcha so you can add it to any of your favorite recipes or smoothies for enhanced flavor.

Matcha green tea is one of the most popular drinks in the world and Micro Ingredients offers the real deal. Providing a 1lb supply with 151 servings. A truly tasty raw matcha powder that is USDA organic.

This superfood plant is mainly used for its edible green leaves, which the whole leaf gets ground up to maximize potency and flavor. This allows for higher left over nutrients including caffeine and antioxidants. All you need to do is simply use the scoop we provide and you can start getting your matcha on.

Traditional matcha powder that you can enjoy in the comfort of your own home or take it on the go in your favorite drink. Micro ingredients fresh matcha green tea powder offers an all-natural flavor ground into a fine powder for easy mixing.

Authentic matcha powder that is not exposed to radiation and made without soy, dairy, gluten, and tree nuts. Ingredients must pass a 3rd party lab test to ensure our product is safe, pure, and potent.

bullets: ✓ Organic Ceremonial Grade Matcha from Japan – Our Organic First Spring Blend Matcha is what we recommend to beginners looking for a decent, all rounded organic ceremonial grade matcha that provides good value for the price.

✓ Mild, Mellow Taste Without Any Bitterness – A smooth yet mellow taste with notes of raw cacao makes this an excellent blend of matcha for matcha lattes,matcha teas or usucha. It has virtually no unpleasant bitterness or astringency.

✓ Organic Ceremonial Grade Matcha - Certified organic by JAS (recognised by USDA). Made from the First Harvest tea leaves from the hilly Kirishima region just outside of Kagoshima city. The tea plants are shade grown, processed into tencha at modern facilities and only ground into matcha powder right before it leaves Japan for the USA.

✓ Improve Your Focus, Boost Energy Without Coffee – Greatly increase your focus and energy by drinking Naoki Matcha. Unlike the typical caffeine rush from coffee, the amino acid L-theanine in Naoki Matcha slowly releases the caffeine which helps to relax the mind and body while providing a steady boost of energy for up to 6 hours.

✓ Proudly Made In Kagoshima - Uji and Kyoto may be the spiritual homes of matcha, but Kagoshima is rapidly growing as a producer of quality matcha. The volcanic soil in Kagoshima has a unique terroir and the tea estates’ there are willing to depart from tradition to create bold new tastes and flavors.

bullets: Perfect Blend – Our herbal tea combines the floral aroma of rose, the sweetness of mulberry, and the tartness of hibiscus to create a unique flavor experience. Rich in anthocyanins and antioxidants, it’s an excellent choice for those seeking a caffeine-free tea option

Abundant Flavor – Each tea bag contains 3g of loose leaf tea. Our pyramid tea bags are larger than standard sizes, providing ample space for the leaves to fully unfurl and enhance the aroma. Each bag can be steeped multiple times, yielding at least 40 cups from the 20-bag sampler. With every steep, discover subtle flavor nuances, making it a cost-effective and deeply satisfying tea experience

Individually Wrapped – Each tea bag is individually sealed in an aluminum foil-lined pouch to maximize freshness. This not only ensures a perfect brew every time but also makes it convenient to carry, providing you with the best experience anytime, anywhere

Rest assured – Our pyramid tea bags are made from PLA material that can withstand temperatures up to 120°C (248°F). This material doesn't release plastic particles, so you can enjoy your tea with peace of mind, while significantly reducing environmental impact. Rest easy knowing you're making the right choice

Easy Brewing – Our tea bags not only retain the advantages of loose leaf tea but also eliminate the need for extra tools or complex steps. Simply add hot water, and each tea bag releases its rich aroma in 2-3 minutes, allowing you to enjoy a flavorful tea experience whether at home, in the office, or on the go

bullets: Premium Regions : Our rose buds are sourced from China's Rose Capital. Grown in over 10,000 acres of pollution-free rose gardens, they are hand-picked, sorted, and carefully packaged—100% natural, and free from additives.

Natural Fragrance : Drinking rose tea is an excellent (and natural) way to obtain significant amounts of vitamin C. This product is caffeine-free. We recommend 1 to 2 cups daily, allowing you to savor the authentic taste of nature.

Freshness-Locked Packaging : Utilizing advanced, food-grade sealed packaging technology, effectively protects against moisture and light, locking in the aroma. This ensures the rose buds maintain their freshness, vibrant color, and rich fragrance to your cups.

Culinery Uses : Dried rose petals can be used to create rose-infused beverages, rose syrup, rose sugar, candied petals, or incorporated into rose salads, cakes, making rose wine, or for bath SPA, our edible roses are a great choice.

Easy to Brew : Place 5-8 rose buds in a cup and pour 80-90°C hot water. The tea gradually unfolds into a clear golden -pink, the fragrant aroma and mellow, sweet taste offer you a dual delight of visual and palate.

important_information.Directions: To make rose tea, place a spoonful of loose-leaf rose buds in a tea infuser and steep in hot water for a few minutes. Remove the infuser and enjoy. To use in culinary applications, follow the specific recipe instructions.

item_details.Flavor: (92) Aroma(23) Color(8) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Olve Blegman 5.0 out of 5 stars  Affordable and Delightful Everyday Longjing Tea Reviewed in the United States on May 23, 2024 Size: 8.8 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase FullChea's Longjing Tea, also known as Dragonwell Tea, is a delightful Chinese green tea that offers excellent value for its price. Originating from the Zhejiang province in China, Longjing tea is renowned for its flat, jade-green leaves and distinct toasty bean aroma. While this particular batch may not be the most pedigreed or highest grade of Longjing, it is perfectly satisfactory for everyday consumption. Longjing tea is traditionally hand-harvested and pan-fried to stop oxidation, preserving its fresh, green flavor. The leaves are carefully picked and processed to maintain their unique shape and quality. FullChea sources this tea from reputable farms in Zhejiang, ensuring that even at an affordable price, the tea retains its characteristic taste and aroma. FullChea is known for providing high-quality teas at reasonable prices. They have built a reputation for offering a wide range of teas, from everyday options to more premium selections. Their commitment to quality and customer satisfaction is evident in the consistent flavor and freshness of their products. Overall, FullChea's Longjing Tea is an excellent choice for those who appreciate the subtle flavors of Chinese green tea without breaking the bank. It's a great everyday tea that delivers a pleasant drinking experience, making it a staple in my tea collection. bullets: Delightful Longjing Tea: The leaves are heated immediately after plucking. The heat prevents the leaves from withering or oxidizing. The dry leaf retains its green color. It has a sweet, rounded flavor, perhaps reminiscent of freshly roasted white bean

Offer you a Freshness Tea: Harvested at the end of April of each year and arrives fresh to your cup. We are here to build the most direct bridge between the tea you hold in your very hands to the last touched by your tea farmer
Natural Origin: Our natural premium Dragon Well is made in the city of Hangzhou. No artificial colors, preservatives or additives
Benefits: Our dragon well green tea is rich in antioxidants and gently supports digestion. Its antioxidant properties help improve skin health, and leaving you feeling refreshed and revitalized

Perfect Shape: Longjing Tea (Dragonwell Tea) is world-famous for its 'four wonders' - emerald green color, aromatic flavor, sweet taste, and beautiful, tender, whole leaves that are uniform in appearance

bullets: Premium Natural Tea: The essence of Osmanthus Oolong lies in the meticulous selection of its ingredients. For the Oolong Tea component, we choose high-mountain Oolong Tea from Taiwan, where misty clouds, fertile soil, and a favorable climate contribute to its unique tea aroma. The osmanthus flowers are sourced from the golden autumn season, carefully selected for their freshness, intense fragrance, and ensure every flower is plump, pure, and exudes a rich aroma

No Additives: Yuexi adheres to a no-additive principle, ensuring every sip is a pure taste of nature. The handmade blend of these natural flavors allows one to deeply appreciate the richness of the tea leaves and the sweetness of the osmanthus flowers

Unique Aroma: The aroma of Osmanthus Oolong is its most celebrated aspect. Upon brewing, a scent of osmanthus gradually rises alongside the tea aroma of the Oolong, creating a lingering fragrance that feels like being immersed in an osmanthus grove, uplifting the spirits. This distinctive aroma not only delights the senses but also has a certain invigorating effect

Rich Flavor: The blend of Oolong's mellow taste and osmanthus's sweet fragrance creates a unique flavor that is neither overly intense nor lacking in subtlety. The tea liquor is smooth on the palate with a lingering sweetness, allowing one to savor the mellowness of the tea and the sweetness of the osmanthus in every sip

Brewing Instructions: Take 3g of tea and pour 100ml of water at 190°F into the cup to enjoy a delightful cup of Osmanthus Oolong. Suitable for both hot and cold brewing, you can add milk or sugar according to your preference, making it a refreshing and healthy beverage at any time of the day

item_details.Flavor: Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026 Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) I’m a heavy tea drinker and enjoy all sorts of teas. At night, I especially love caffeine-free herbal teas to relax, so I was excited to try this Osmanthus Flower Herbal Tea. Right out of the bag, the aroma is subtle. It has a light peachy, floral fragrance that made me really look forward to the first cup. I also appreciate that it’s naturally caffeine-free, which makes it perfect for evening tea. One thing I noticed right away is that there were no brewing instructions included, so I had to guess on water temperature and steep time. After brewing, the tea turned out to be very delicate—almost too faint to taste. The peachy scent is there, but the actual flavor in the cup is extremely light. I kept hoping it would develop more as it steeped, but it remained quite subtle and difficult to taste. Bottom line: - Subtle peachy floral aroma - Naturally caffeine-free for nighttime tea - Very delicate, faint flavor - No brewing instructions included If you enjoy very light, subtle herbal teas, this Osmanthus Flower Herbal Tea might be a good fit. Personally, I tend to prefer bolder, stronger teas, so the flavor was a little too delicate for my taste. Read more Helpful Report  T. Crumb 5.0 out of 5 stars  Nice floral aroma Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026 Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) This is my first time trying Osmanthus tea, and it was a very pleasant experience. It is a subtle, floral tea which I brewed the same way I brew my other loose leaf non-black teas (steep 3-5 min in slightly below boiling water). It has a very nice aroma and a slightly fruity taste. I like sugar in my tea so I added about half a teaspoon. The listing says you can use this tea as an ingredient for baking, fruit preserves, or cocktail making. That’s really quite adventurous and I’ve never thought to use tea in that way. But I could see how this flavor could enhance other teas. I am intentionally not commenting on the health implications of the product because I am not a doctor or homeopath so I have no idea whether this tea will “cleanse” you or not. bullets: SOOTHING FLORAL TEA WITH AROMATHERAPEUTIC BENEFITS – osmanthus flower tea is treasured for its delicate, honeyed aroma and calming qualities. Its soothing scent has been used in aromatherapy traditions to promote relaxation, making it a wonderful choice for unwinding after a long day
Osmanthus is deeply woven into tradition, appearing in poetry, art, and festivals. The Mid-Autumn Festival often features osmanthus wine and cake

VERSATILE & CAFFEINE-FREE – enjoy osmanthus tea on its own, blend it with green or white tea, or use it to infuse desserts, syrups, and even cocktails. Caffeine-free and gentle on the system, this floral tea is perfect for sipping throughout the day without disrupting sleep
Osmanthus flowers are blended with green or oolong teas, imparting a honeyed, fruity fragrance.Used in jams, desserts, and syrups for their delicate sweetness.

[MUST READ) Reviewed in the United States on December 1, 2020 Color: 80g silver needle white teaVerified Purchase I am not a tea expert but I've been drinking silver needle white tea exclusively for a few years. I drink it because of it's relaxing affects on the mind and body. I also drink it for its antioxidants. I really really like this tea. Its not bitter. Its light yet flavorful. I taste more of a fruity undertone. It smells good. It smells inviting. I don't think it smells very flowery, but more on a light fruit, maybe with an undertone of flowery. It does not smell like hay or grass. It comes packaged in a thick quality plastic zip-lock. Fresh! It was packed tightly, so I was expecting to see broken buds. But the buds were full and whole. None broken. They were on the lightly colored side as the photo shows. No twigs, no leafy stuff, just full buds. It arrived next day. I'm very happy with it. I like to mix mine with a teaspoon of peach preserves and a teaspoon on honey. Yummy! I've come to learn silver needle is high in anti-oxidants. It also has a very calming affect due to its naturally occurring L-theanine. I've become addicted to this tea due its calming affect. P.S. Don't even waste time and money trying any of the other silver needle teas. I've already made that mistake a few times and each time I come back to this. 22 people found this helpful Helpful Report  Sweet Birch 5.0 out of 5 stars  Very Pleasant and Comforting White Tea Reviewed in the United States on June 28, 2019 Color: 80g silver needle white teaVerified Purchase I brewed this tea Eastern Style using a 190 ml teapot and followed temp suggestions at 185℉. To brew in a teapot I used approximately 6 grams of tea and used steep times of 45 sec, 60 sec, 90 sec, 140 sec, 180 sec. While the steep times were tentative, next time I will use longer steeps to start as I feel it would deepen the flavors already present. Dry Leaf Aroma/Appearance: The leaf buds are fuzzy with down and quite lovely and soft to the touch.(You can see in the picture I took that the leaf buds are definitely fuzzy!) The dry leaf was sweet and smelled of fresh apricots and melons. There was also a hint of sweet grass aroma. Wet Leaf: The wet leaf leaf has a lightly spiced and woodsy aroma with the apricot and fruit aroma returning later on. Tea Liquor Aroma/Taste: The tea liquor smells of lightly spiced cinnamon with sweet vanilla. The taste is also sweet with hints of vanilla and a light cinnamon flavor. It leaves a wonderfully creamy mouthfeel, causes salivation and makes you anticipate the next sip. There is no bitterness or astringency only a sweetness. The fruit and apricot flavors are present in later steeps mixed with the light cinnamon and vanilla flavors. It is a very yummy and comforting tea. A wonderful tea to have on a cold morning in winter or anytime your heart fancies. My entire family enjoyed this tea with me. Final Thoughts: This tea has a wonderful aroma beginning from the dry leaf to the tea liquor. It is substantially different from the dry leaf to the wet leaf so don’t let that get you off track. It is sweet and has a very balanced flavor with a creamy texture that leaves you wanting to try that next sip. The tea liquor is light golden yellow as is to be expected with white teas. I enjoyed the contrast of the different flavors that occurred within each steeping. It is a very light and delicate tea which is nice to have sometimes when you don’t want anything too heavy and it was perfect outside on a hot day. I would definitely recommend this tea as an anytime tea and especially one that would be nice on cold days for comfort. I enjoyed this tea and would definitely purchase it again. Read more 32 people found this helpful Helpful Report  Thomas 5.0 out of 5 stars  Simply The Best Tea I've Ever Had Reviewed in the United States on February 5, 2021 Color: 80g silver needle white teaVerified Purchase I don't claim to be a tea connoisseur, but I've been a steady tea drinker for more than 20 years, having sampled between 6 and 10 during that time, including 3 or 4 white teas. I have my favorites. But this "Silver Needle White Tea | Chinese Silver Tips Tea | Bai Hao Yin Zhen" is simply the best tea of ever had. I use what probably amounts to a generous tablespoon to make 12 ounces of this delicious brew at a time. Unlike other loose teas, this Silver Needle White is not at all "brittle" to the touch, but feels rather like rolled flower petals, though not at all "wet." I steep it for about 3 minutes. Unlike other white teas (including some delicious ones) which range in color from light to dark brown, this Silver Needle tea is what I would describe as clear pale brownish-pink. And remember, I'm probably using a little more than most people might. I'd describe the aroma as fresh, clean, delicate, slightly "floral" aroma, which is not quite as pronounced as my second favorite tea, "Royal King White Peony Tea." It has a very faint natural sweetness, but I add 1/4 teaspoon of Truvia (stevia) sweetener to my 12 oz cup of Silver Needle. By the way, I find I can make a second brew (an 8 oz serving) using the same leaves I used for the original 12 ounces...and it has only slightly less color and flavor as the first brew. bullets: 🍃【WHITE TEA】Osmanthus silver needle white tea is made by mixing silver needles from Yunnan and sweet-scented osmanthus from Guangxi in proportion. The fragrance of golden osmanthus and the sweetness of white tea blend together, not only does not lose the true taste of tea, but also has a fresh scent of osmanthus, which makes people smell extremely comfortable.

🍃【AROMA AND TASTE】The hand-picked osmanthus silver needle white tea soup is clear and translucent, and the taste of tea and the aroma of flowers complement each other. The taste is mellow and mild, refreshing and delicious, with a faint sweetness spreading and endless aftertaste.

🍃【ENJOY CHINESE TEA】White tea expands naturally in water, and it dances with osmanthus. Not only is it pleasing to the eye, but the sweet fragrance makes you feel the beauty of nature. White tea accompanies you in all seasons, and a cup of it every day can care for your skin and beautify your skin. Don't forget to love yourself even when you are busy with work.

🍃【BREWING INSTRUCTIONS】1)Take 3g tea leaves into a cup or tea pot. 2)Add boiling water and quickly pour it away, so that the tea leaves wake up. 3)Add 150ml/180ml (5.07oz-6.08zo) hot water with 90℃95℃ (194F-203F). 4)Steep for about 2-3 minutes, pour out the tea soup and taste the aroma of the tea.
🍃【STORAGE WAY】Store in a sealed, cool, dry place away from light and ventilation. If possible, it is best to keep it fresh in the refrigerator.

bullets: Masterfully blended by Osulloc, we offer a great variety of blended teas that come in teabags for easy use. Based on green tea or fermented black team these blended teas are infused with various flowers and fruits, some of which are grown on Jeju island.

Notes of Tropical Black Tea: Immerse yourself in the sweet, intoxicating scents of ripe mango and peach. Each sip of this tropical black tea infuses the air with its delightful aroma, reminiscent of a serene paradise, making it an ideal companion for moments of relaxation and reflection
Recommend For: Those with a predilection for sweet fruit-infused teas and anyone eager to explore a unique take on traditional black tea.
Enjoy hot or iced - Prepare the tea with hot water or let the tea cool and mix it with ice for a refreshing, chilled drink.

Korea's #1 premium tea brand: Osulloc, Korea's most popular tea brand, cultivating and harvesting tea on Jeju Island since 1979. Osulloc is a premium tea brand worldwide and has taken first place in many global tea competitions

bullets: When you're craving the summertime breeze, try our Peach Fruit Tea. We blend fruit pieces with rosehips, hibiscus, and natural flavors to produce a beautiful, vibrant ruby red drink.

The peach flavor is a pure delight for this caffeine-free brew, which is delicious served hot or iced. Absolutely NO CAFFEINE. This blend is all fruit, no tea, so you can be sure there is no caffeine in this thirst-quenching brew.

Delicious brewed as a hot tea, but perhaps even more delicious when brewed as an Iced Tea. Trying to drink more water? Brew up a batch of this delicious tea, keep in the fridge for a perfect refreshment any time of day!
Ingredients: Rosehips, hibiscus, peach pieces, orange peel, apple pieces, safflower petals, peach flavor. Contains natural ingredients.

bullets: Elevated Peach Loose Leaf Tea – Light, Smooth & Café-Inspired - This refined peach loose leaf tea blends real peach, apple, and mango for a smooth, delicate fruit-forward experience. Inspired by a classic peach bellini, this peach herbal tea is light, elegant, and beautifully balanced — not overpowering, but refreshingly subtle.

Fruity White Herbal Tea – Naturally Caffeine-Free & Refreshing - Crafted as a gentle white herbal peach tea, this caffeine-free loose leaf tea offers a soft, naturally sweet sip without bitterness. Perfect for slow mornings, afternoon resets, or evening wind-down moments.

Delicious Hot or Iced – Customize Your Perfect Peach - Enjoy this peach loose leaf tea hot or iced. Brew warm for a cozy café-style cup, or cold brew for a smooth, lightly bright peach iced tea. Prefer a sweeter sip? It’s even more delicious with a touch of stevia or a splash of fresh lemon juice to enhance the peach flavor naturally.

Full Leaf Loose Tea – Real Fruit Pieces, No Dusty Tea Bags - Made with whole fruit pieces for a true full leaf peach tea experience, this loose tea delivers cleaner flavor extraction than traditional peach tea bags. You see the ingredients. You taste the difference.

Made in the USA – Woman-Owned & Happiness Guaranteed - Proudly blended and packed in Florida, our peach loose leaf herbal tea is 100% woman-owned and heartcrafted with love. If you’re not completely in love with your peach tea, just let us know — we’ll make it right.

important_information.Safety Information: Contains common allergens: peach, pineapple, mango, and strawberry. Keep out of reach of children. Ingredients Peach Pieces, Rose Petals, Pineapple Pieces, Mango Pieces, Orange Peels, Strawberry Pieces, and Apple Pieces, Natural Peach Flavor

Helpful Report  Byte 4.0 out of 5 stars  Product is GREAT but quality inspection for how it's packaged is lacking Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2024 Verified Purchase I've purchased this a few times now and, while I'll continue to purchase this product because I love it, I will warn future buyers on how the product sometimes arrives damaged. Twice in a row several packages INSIDE the individual boxes sometimes arrive damaged and unsealed. The contents spill inside the box and leak outside into the larger container. I guess these aren't stored in a 100% dry environment as there's a very slight 'sticky' residue on the boxes with the damaged product, perhaps where it came into contact with humidity or moisture in the air? Product is still good, though. I'd just throw out damaged products or the entire individual box it came in (depending on the damage) so it slightly decreases it's value. To rate the product without it's faults, it's really good. My favorite is the peach ice tea, but I also really like the pomegranate, and the raspberry black tea! Watch out for the caffeine though, if you're sensitive. I'm not sure how much they contain, but they do come with caffeine (makes sense, seeing as some of them are made with black tea). item_details.Flavor: Name: Rest in PeachSize: 19.2 Fl Oz (Pack of 8)Verified Purchase What a disappointing pivot. This used to be one of the very few drinks that felt intentionally crafted — clean tea, soft peach, just enough natural sweetness from agave. No aftertaste, no gimmicks, no compromise. It was my only Subscribe & Save for that exact reason. It was in a lane of its own. Now? The new version is overwhelmed by that familiar bitter, metallic note that only Stevia can deliver. I know, tEcHnIcAlLy not artificial — but tell that to my taste buds. The flavor has shifted from subtle and balanced to sharp, synthetic, and lingering in the worst way. I’m sure some focus group somewhere gave it the green light. Probably folks who think Diet X and Zero Y are GREAT! But for those of us who loved this drink precisely because it wasn’t trying to be like everything else — the change is a total miss. It’s gone from a singular standout to just another face in the crowd. Everyone I know who was loyal to it has dropped off. I guess we’re not the target audience anymore. Shame to see something so rare and well-loved diluted like this. 41 people found this helpful Helpful Report See more reviews Sponsored  Back to top Get to Know Us Careers Amazon Newsletter About bullets: Masterfully blended by Osulloc, we offer a great variety of blended teas that come in teabags for easy use. Based on green tea or fermented black tea, these blended teas are infused with various flowers and fruits, some of which are grown on Jeju island.

[Notes of Honey Pear Tea] Luscious aroma of pears embraced by the sweetness of honey, based on deepest aroma of fermented tea. Enjoy Osulloc's signature blended tea series that are carefully crafted by our tea masters.
[Recommend for] Those who enjoy teas with the sweet fragrance of fruit, we recommend trying our special blended tea.
[Enjoy Hot or Iced] Prepare the tea with hot water, or let the tea cool and mix with ice for a refreshing chilled drink.

[Korea's #1 premium tea brand] Osulloc, Korea's most popular tea brand, cultivating and harvesting tea on Jeju Island since 1979. Osulloc is a premium tea brand worldwide and has taken first place in many global tea competitions

important_information.Directions: 1. Boil water and let it cool slightly for green tea (recommended temperature: 160°F - 180°F). For black tea, use boiling water (212°F). 2. Place one tea bag in a cup or teapot. 3. Pour the hot water over the tea bag, covering the tea completely. 4. Let the tea steep for 2-3 minutes for green tea or 3-5 minutes for black tea. 5. Remove the tea bag and enjoy the tea. 6. For iced tea, let the tea cool and mix with ice.

bullets: A REFRESHING, FRUITY ESCAPE: Savor the delightful blend of pineapple, apple, and pear, perfectly paired with the delicate flavor of white tea in a cup. Pear Reverie offers a burst of natural sweetness and refreshing taste, making it the ideal organic low-caffeine tea for any time of the day. A satisfying sip of pure fruit tea-inspired bliss.

NATURALLY SWEET AND SMOOTH: With smooth, naturally flavored sweet tea bags containing blackberry leaves and marigolds, Pear Reverie delivers a calming, delicious tea experience. It’s the perfect alternative to sugary drinks, offering a refreshing, flavorful treat to enjoy anytime you want to indulge in something special.

A UNIQUE HERBAL BLEND: Pear Reverie combines white tea loose leaf, lemongrass, and white hibiscus in a harmonious blend that refreshes and delights. This low-caffeine herbal tea provides a smooth, balanced taste, making it the ideal choice when you're looking to unwind without the intensity of higher-caffeine teas. Sip and enjoy its calming essence.

TIMELESS, TROPICAL REFRESHMENT: Pear Reverie offers a refreshing tea experience with tropical pineapple and pear flavors, complemented by floral blackberry leaves. Crafted with white tea, marigolds, and lemongrass, this low-caffeine, vegan, gluten-free herbal tea is the perfect flavorful escape, whether hot or cold, anytime you desire a delicious break.

RESEALABLE, REUSABLE TEA POUCH: No matter where life takes you, Pear Reverie Herbal Tea is there to refresh you. Whether you’re at home, at work, or on-the-go, enjoy this delightful, fruity blend in a bulk pouch, sleek tin, or portable pouch—perfect for satisfying your cravings whenever and wherever you need a burst of flavor.

bullets: A REFRESHING, FRUITY ESCAPE: Savor the delightful blend of pineapple, apple, and pear, perfectly paired with the delicate flavor of white tea in a cup. Pear Reverie offers a burst of natural sweetness and refreshing taste, making it the ideal organic low-caffeine tea for any time of the day. A satisfying sip of pure fruit tea-inspired bliss.

NATURALLY SWEET AND SMOOTH: With smooth, naturally flavored sweet tea bags containing blackberry leaves and marigolds, Pear Reverie delivers a calming, delicious tea experience. It’s the perfect alternative to sugary drinks, offering a refreshing, flavorful treat to enjoy anytime you want to indulge in something special.

A UNIQUE HERBAL BLEND: Pear Reverie combines white tea loose leaf, lemongrass, and white hibiscus in a harmonious blend that refreshes and delights. This low-caffeine herbal tea provides a smooth, balanced taste, making it the ideal choice when you're looking to unwind without the intensity of higher-caffeine teas. Sip and enjoy its calming essence.

TIMELESS, TROPICAL REFRESHMENT: Pear Reverie offers a refreshing tea experience with tropical pineapple and pear flavors, complemented by floral blackberry leaves. Crafted with white tea, marigolds, and lemongrass, this low-caffeine, vegan, gluten-free herbal tea is the perfect flavorful escape, whether hot or cold, anytime you desire a delicious break.

RESEALABLE, REUSABLE TEA TIN: No matter where life takes you, Pear Reverie Herbal Tea is there to refresh you. Whether you’re at home, at work, or on-the-go, enjoy this delightful, fruity blend in a bulk pouch, sleek tin, or portable pouch—perfect for satisfying your cravings whenever and wherever you need a burst of flavor.

important_information.Safety Information: May contain allergens: pineapple and pear. Ingredients pineapple (pineapple, cane sugar), white tea, apple, lemongrass, natural flavors, white hibiscus, sweet blackberry leaves, marigolds, pear (pear, rice flour)

item_details.Flavor: Profile: The Perfect Balance ​The most impressive part of these blends is the flavor balance. Often, instant teas are either sugar-bombs or unpleasantly sharp, but these hit the "goldilocks" zone. ​Not Too Sweet: There is just enough sweetness to make it a treat, but it doesn't leave that heavy, sugary aftertaste. It feels light enough to drink every day. ​Not Too Bitter: Even the matcha—which can sometimes be harsh—is incredibly smooth. There is no lingering bitterness, just a clean finish. ​Just Right: The ratio of tea to creaminess is spot on, allowing the natural notes of the green and black teas to come through clearly. ​Versatility ​While these are designed for a quick hot drink, they are surprisingly versatile: ​Iced Latte: Dissolve the packet in a small amount of hot water first, then pour over ice and cold milk. ​Smoothie Boost: Toss a matcha packet into a fruit smoothie for an easy flavor upgrade. ​On the Road: If you're traveling or headed outdoors, these are ideal because they only require hot water to feel like a high-end cafe drink. item_details.Flavor: ** The taste is superbly balanced, with a smooth creaminess that perfectly complements the robust flavor of black tea. It has just the right amount of sweetness, making it a great choice for those who enjoy a classic milk tea without the need for additional sugar. **Convenience:** Preparation is incredibly easy. Just add hot water to the powder, and you have a delicious cup of milk tea ready in seconds. It's perfect for busy mornings or when you need a quick pick-me-up during the day. **Portability:** The 280g package is resealable, which helps keep the tea fresh and makes it convenient to store. The size is ideal for taking to the office or even on trips, ensuring I can enjoy my favorite beverage anywhere. **Versatility:** Beyond being enjoyed hot, it also makes a refreshing iced tea. Simply dissolve the mix in a small amount of hot water, add cold water and ice, and you have a refreshing iced milk tea. It pairs well with a variety of snacks or desserts. **Conclusion:** Overall, the Nitto Kocha Instant Royal Milk Tea is a fantastic product for anyone who loves milk tea. It’s flavorful, convenient, and versatile, making it a great addition to any tea lover’s collection. I highly recommend giving it a try! bullets: Made Within 12 Hours of Harvest: At Aloderma, our skincare is rooted in the earth. Our Aloe is processed on-site and turned into final products within hours of leaving the fields to ensure that we capture the natural power of Aloe Vera in every product we make. Aloderma has over 20 years of working with Aloe providing high quality and affordable products for beauty, health and wellness.

Aloderma: We are a family run farm-to-face skin care line focused on producing and creating high-quality organic aloe vera-based products in an ecologically friendly way. We grow organic aloe vera on our own farms and manufacture all of our own products in our factory. Our primary raw ingredient, Aloe Vera, is certified USDA and European Union organic by ECOCERT.

Pure Aloe Vera Gel: Aloderma Pure Aloe Gel is made with pure organic aloe and combined with hydrating ingredients to make a fast-acting moisturizer to restore skin's natural balance and hydration. It provides intense hydration for a plump and supple complexion. It’s lightweight and fast-absorbing and it’s suitable for all skin types.

Multifunctional: Our pure aloe vera gel will calm and cool your skin after sun exposure or just when it is need of a pick-me-up. Its aloe base and gentle formula soothes skin irritation and nourishes dry skin, scalps, and hair. It has cooling and calming properties to help reduce redness and provide support for your hair, skin and scalp regardless of season.

Radiant Beauty: Enhance your natural beauty with our nourishing gel, providing balance of hydration and radiance to your skin. Our nourishing and refreshing aloe gel helps maintain skin's natural balance and pH levels. It helps to reduce dryness and flaking, leaving skin feeling soft and supple.

bullets: Made Within 12 Hours of Harvest: At Aloderma, our skincare is rooted in the earth. Our Aloe is processed on-site and turned into final products within hours of leaving the fields to ensure that we capture the natural power of Aloe Vera in every product we make. Aloderma has over 20 years of working with Aloe providing high quality and affordable products for beauty, health and wellness.

Nourish Your Skin: Boost your skin's hydration and soothe dryness with our organic aloe vera gel. Our pure aloe gel for sunburn relief is a gentle, cooling gel that helps to soothe the skin and provide relief from dry, sensitive and irritated skin. Shield your skin with our aloe vera gel, a natural barrier against harmful environmental elements.

Embrace Natural Beauty: Experience the invigorating sensation of our organic Aloe Vera Gel, providing your skin with deep hydration and a revitalizing boost. This product is formulated with 99% Organic Aloe Vera Gel to help reduce redness and moisturize dry skin.

Unveil Your Radiance: Rediscover your skin's natural radiance and regain your confidence with our aloe vera gel. Transform your skin's appearance, as our aloe vera gel helps revive dull, tired-looking skin, leaving it revitalized and refreshed.

Aloderma: We are a family run farm-to-face skin care line focused on producing and creating high-quality organic aloe vera-based products in an ecologically friendly way. We grow organic aloe vera on our own farms and manufacture all of our own products in our factory. Our primary raw ingredient, Aloe Vera, is certified USDA and European Union organic by ECOCERT.

bullets: PREMIUM NEW ZEALAND MANUKA HONEY — MGO 50+: Harvested from pristine Manuka forests in New Zealand, this raw, monofloral Manuka honey contains naturally occurring MGO 50+. Reviewed in the United States on June 11, 2023 Verified Purchase My favorite Spearmint brand is Bachs. But since their Spearmint is only out at Xmas and I found these, I can't tell you how excited I was to find this product. Yesterday I put a handful in my small bag I carry on my saddle. I leave my house and I decided to open one. Well I drove two blocks to my turn onto University Drive while trying my darndest to twist open one side. Lefty Lucy - Righty Tighty!!!!! I tried the other side. I drove a half a mile still trying to untwist this candy!! I enter the 202 Freeway and was still trying to twist it open. I tried one side then the other side. After a couple more miles I finally got this ca ndy open. Good Lord, after all that aggravation I couldn't wait to put it in my mouth. Well, this Spearmint candy has a very muted taste of Spearmint. So much so that had I been blindfolded, there would have been no chance at all to tell what the flavor was. I couldn't even tell if my life depended on it. So I meet two friends to go out on a trail ride on our horses. I told them I was going to give each one a piece of Spearment candy and I was going to time them. They both said they love Spearmint. So......let the game begin. Started the timer. The first friend got her open in about 15 seconds. But my other kept working on hers and 1:47 seconds later she finally got her opened. We figured the first friend got one that accidentally didn't get twisted 400 times on each side. Both agreed it didn't taste of Spearmint and also were disappointed. One said we should use it at a baby shower for a game. So we will blindfold each guest so they won't know the flavor then whomever gets their candy open first will get a prize and the one that takes the longest will get a prize too.
