bullets: PEPPERMINT IS AN AROMATIC, ESSENTIAL OIL-RICH, FLAVORFUL HERB WITH EXCEPTIONAL VERSATILITY AND PRACTICAL VALUE. Only high-quality, carefully tested seeds can produce flavorful, beneficial peppermint—and that’s exactly what we offer. These are premium, non-GMO American seeds, professionally selected for their outstanding germination rates and vigorous growth. Our peppermint seeds are responsibly sourced in the USA to ensure top quality and freshness.

NATURALLY GIFTED BY THE EARTH, PEPPERMINT IS A BOTANICAL KNOWN FOR ITS EXCEPTIONAL PROFILE AND HAS LONG BEEN TREASURED IN HERBAL TRADITIONS.Due to its complex composition, peppermint requires proper handling and cultivation.It contains one of the highest known concentrations of essential oils, particularly menthol, making it one of the most aromatic and flavorful herbs.Each pack contains approximately 2370 peppermint seeds.The included growing instructions make it easy for beginners to succeed.

PEPPERMINT HAS LONG BEEN USED IN VARIOUS WELLNESS PRACTICES TO SUPPORT RELAXATION, UPLIFT THE MOOD, EASE TENSION, AND HELP IMPROVE RESTFULNESS. Regular use is said to have a cumulative benefit when incorporated into a consistent daily routine.

PEPPERMINT ALSO SERVES AS A REFRESHING AND BENEFICIAL CULINARY ADDITION. Its bold sweet aroma and warm, sharp taste with a cooling aftertone make it a favorite in all types of recipes. The leaves, both fresh and dried, are widely used in savory sauces and blends, pesto, marinades, soups, meats, vegetables, salads, and more.

IT ALSO FLAVORS FRUIT DRINKS, COCKTAILS, SMOOTHIES, DESSERTS, BAKED GOODS, AND TEAS. Peppermint tea is naturally sweet and caffeine-free, with no calories. The high menthol content gives it a crisp, cooling effect that is widely appreciated. It is also known for supporting healthy digestion and may help manage appetite when used as part of a balanced diet.

WHAT MAKES PEPPERMINT TRULY SPECIAL IS ITS ABUNDANCE OF BIOLOGICALLY ACTIVE COMPOUNDS. Known as a natural antioxidant, it contains plant-based nutrients that help maintain overall balance and vitality.

PEPPERMINT IS RICH IN ESSENTIAL VITAMINS AND MINERALS INCLUDING VITAMIN A (RETINOL), VITAMIN C (ASCORBIC ACID), B-COMPLEX VITAMINS LIKE B2 (RIBOFLAVIN), B3 (NIACIN), B6 (PYRIDOXINE), B9 (FOLIC ACID), AND VITAMINS D, E, AND K. It also contains key minerals such as iron, phosphorus, potassium, calcium, copper, zinc, manganese, magnesium, sodium, and trace elements like strontium.

AMINO ACIDS FOUND IN PEPPERMINT INCLUDE TRYPTOPHAN, GLYCINE, ARGININE, BETAINE, LYSINE, VALINE, AND OTHERS. Additional active elements include cineole, rutin, flavonoids, phytoncides, phytosterols, phytoestrogens, carotenoids, terpenes, tannins, and pectin substances. A wide variety of natural acids and bioactive compounds further enhance its nutritional value.

WITH ITS EXTRAORDINARY PROFILE, PEPPERMINT OFFERS MULTIPLE BENEFITS TO ENHANCE OVERALL LIFESTYLE AND WELL-BEING. These seeds also make a wonderful gift for anyone who enjoys gardening, cooking, or herbal tea blends. Peppermint remains one of the most valued herbs in both culinary and home use, appreciated for its vivid flavor, natural freshness, and versatility across countless applications.

bullets: FRESH SEEDS FOR MAXIMUM FLAVOR - Our mint seeds for planting are fresh and high-quality, offering great value with 1800 seeds per pack. Start your herb garden and enjoy the vibrant taste of homegrown mint in your dishes.

PERFECT FOR BEGINNERS - These herb seeds come with detailed instructions, making them easy to plant. Whether you're a novice or an expert, you'll find setting up your indoor herb garden fun and straightforward.

FAST GERMINATION FOR QUICK RESULTS - Experience the joy of fast-growing mint seeds! Our seeds boast an 85-90% germination rate, ensuring quick and efficient herb growth, perfect for your herb seeds for planting outdoors.

VERSATILE AND GREAT FOR ALL LEVELS - Ideal for all experience levels, our herb garden seeds are appreciated for their quick germination and fresh growth. Add them to your collection of vegetable seeds for a diverse garden.
HIGHLY RECOMMENDED SEED PACKS - Customers love our herbs seeds for planting packs as thoughtful gifts. Nicely packaged, they make an awesome gift for friends and family with a green thumb.

TRUSTED QUALITY AND VALUE - As a name-brand retailer, we provide non-GMO, heirloom seeds sourced in the USA. Our mint seeds are reliable, offering consistent growth and great results for your mint plants for indoors.

GROW YOUR OWN HERBAL TEA - Use our mint seeds for planting outdoor to start a tea garden. Enjoy fresh, homegrown mint in your teas, adding a delightful touch to your beverages. Perfect for tea enthusiasts and indoor plant seed growers!

ENJOY FRESH HERBS YEAR-ROUND - Our mint seeds for planting are perfect for creating an indoor or outdoor herb garden. Grow fresh mint all year long and enhance your cooking, tea making, and gardening experiences.

CONTAINER GARDENING ESSENTIAL: Mint is an incredibly vigorous grower with invasive roots (runners) that can quickly take over a garden bed. Pro Tip: We strongly recommend planting Mint in pots or containers (even if buried in the ground) to keep its enthusiastic roots contained while enjoying endless harvests.

SURFACE SOW FOR SUCCESS: Mint seeds are tiny! They need light to germinate. Do not bury them. Simply press the seeds gently onto the surface of moist soil and keep them consistently damp (use a spray bottle). Sprouts will appear in 10-15 days.

item_details.Flavor: Name: SpearmintSize: 1.5 lbsAmazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) The 1.5-pound container offers a generous supply of individually wrapped Starlight Mints, a universally recognized and beloved hard candy. These traditional sweets are characterized by a potent and super-refreshing spearmint flavor, providing more than just a momentary sweet indulgence. Beyond satisfying a craving, the unique properties of the spearmint flavor make these candies functional. They are notably effective as a simple, time-tested remedy for soothing an unsettled stomach or mild nausea. Furthermore, their classic appearance—typically a white candy with colorful, spiraling stripes—allows them to be used with flair as an elegant and simple garnish atop various desserts, such as chocolate cakes, ice cream sundaes, or frosted cookies, adding both visual appeal and a burst of minty freshness. The individual wrapping ensures maximum hygiene and portability, making them perfect for keeping in a purse, desk drawer, or for placing in a decorative bowl as an after-dinner treat. bullets: Thoughtfully Crafted Herbal Blend, Our chrysanthemum cassia seed tea brings together cassia seeds, burdock root, goji berries, and chrysanthemum flowers in one soothing caffeine-free blend. Unlike single-herb teas that taste flat, this carefully balanced mix offers a mildly sweet, earthy flavor with no bitterness. Each tea sachet contains only natural ingredients – no artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives

Convenient Sachets for Any Lifestyle, Each box gives you 20 individual tea bags, each holding 5g (0.176 oz) of premium herbal blend. Grab one sachet for your office mug, travel thermos, or evening cup at home. No measuring, no messy loose-leaf cleanup. Compared to bulk loose-leaf teas that lose freshness quickly, our sealed sachets lock in aroma and potency until you steep

Clean Ingredients, Nothing Extra, We keep it simple: cassia seeds, burdock root, goji berries, and chrysanthemum. That's it. This herbal tea is naturally gluten-free, vegan, and contains zero added sugar, zero caffeine, and zero calories. Perfect for anyone looking for a clean, relaxing cup any time of day

Steep Hot or Cold in Minutes, Easy to prepare – just place one sachet in 8-10 oz of hot water and steep for 3-5 minutes. For iced tea, steep double strength in hot water, then pour over ice. The fine mesh sachets allow full flavor extraction without tearing or leaking. Unlike cheap tea bags that taste like paper, our sachets release the full character of chrysanthemum and cassia seeds evenly

Resealable Box for Good Storability, The box is designed to keep your remaining sachets fresh. After opening, simply close the flap and store in a cool, dry place. Each sachet stays protected from moisture and odors – so your last cup tastes as good as the first. Net weight 100g (3.53 oz) for the whole box. No need for extra canisters or clips. Enjoy a naturally soothing herbal tea whenever you need a moment to unwind

bullets: Fresh & Clean: This kind of baby chrysanthemum need to be manually picked before the buds are fully open in order to ensure that they are fresh and clean. A complete flower bud can maintain its nutrition and reduce the chance of being polluted.

Healthy Herbal Tea: Chrysanthemum tea is a natural healthy drink, containing rich vitamins and amino acids. It can effectively protect the liver and discharge the accumulated waste in the human body. In addition, it can help protect eyesight, especially for those who need to work with computers for the long term.

Natural Sweetish: After brewing, the tea soup will spread out the gentle aroma of chrysanthemum. It will taste a little sweet but quite smooth, mixed with some honey flavor if savor carefully. Drinking a perfect cup of chrysanthemum tea will be a real relaxation and relief in leisure time.

Interesing Blend: Chrysanthemum tea can be combined with many wonderful things. Want for more sweetness? Just add some honey. A desire for some interesting blends? Try a piece of lemon or a few American ginseng. But a great cup of chrysanthemum tea is the most significant.

important_information.Safety Information: Keep out of reach of young children. Be cautious when handling loose leaf tea. Ingredients Dried Chrysanthemum Flower
important_information.Directions: To brew FullChea Chinese Chrysanthemum Tea, add dried chrysanthemum flowers to hot water. Optionally, add honey for more sweetness or a piece of lemon or a few American ginseng for interesting blends.

bullets: About the Product: Parachute Advansed presents a non-sticky hair oil infused with the enriching essence of coconut and jasmine extracts. Designed to provide deep-root nourishment, this hair oil helps control damage and dandruff, leaving your scalp revitalized and your hair healthier.

Goodness of Coconut: Enriched with the natural goodness of coconut, this hair oil offers multifaceted benefits. Coconut nourishes the hair follicles, promoting hair growth, while its anti-fungal properties help eliminate dandruff, ensuring a healthy scalp environment conducive to hair re-growth

10X Penetration: With its unique formulation, coconut oil penetrates the hair shafts up to 10 times deeper compared to other oils. This deep penetration ensures thorough moisturization and nourishment of the hair, strengthening it from within and making it more resilient to damage.

Magic of Jasmine: Infused with the enchanting fragrance of jasmine extracts, this hair oil not only leaves your hair smelling delightful but also imparts a natural shine. Jasmine extracts have been revered for their ability to add luster and vitality to the hair, enhancing its overall appearance.

Goodness of Vitamin E: Vitamin E, a potent antioxidant, plays a crucial role in reducing hair damage and strengthening the hair shafts. By repairing and fortifying the hair strands, it restores the natural shine and resilience of your hair, ensuring long-lasting health and vitality.
Best before 36 months from the date of manufacturing. Manufacturing date is mentioned in the back of product.

bullets: NO OILS, NO GUMS: Califia Organic Coconutmilk is made with just four simple ingredients and without oils or gums. Just shake it up and enjoy!

PLANT-BASED AND ORGANIC: Califia Organic Almondmilk is USDA certified organic with zero additives. No dairy, oil, gums, gluten, soy, and carrageenan. It’s everything you want in dairy-free plant milk and nothing you don’t.

FOUR SIMPLE INGREDIENTS: Purified water, coconut cream, coconut water, and a pinch of baking soda. This is plant-based dairy-free goodness in its purest form. No oils and no gums. It’s deliciously simple.
IRRESISTIBLY GOOD: Califia Farms products are made with plant-based ingredients to achieve irresistible goodness in every way––taste, versatility, and all the benefits of being dairy-free.
DON'T FORGET TO SHAKE: Settling is natural in high-quality plant-based milks so remember to shake well!

important_information.Safety Information: Shake well before use. Store refrigerated between 35-40°F (2-4°C). Contains coconut, which may cause an allergic reaction in some individuals. Ingredients Water, Organic Coconut Cream, Organic Coconut Water from Concentrate, Baking Soda

bullets: DAIRY FREE ALTERNATIVE: Evaporated Coconut Milk is a dairy free alternative to canned evaporated milk.
MILD COCONUT FLAVOR: Evaporated Coconut Milk adds creamy richness and a mild coconut flavor that complements many recipes.
GREAT IN DESSERTS: Use in your favorite desserts, including pumpkin pies, coconut cream pies, puddings, bread puddings, and fudges.

ENDLESS USES: So versatile, use as a non-dairy substitute for creamer in coffee and tea. Or, add Evaporated Coconut Milk to smoothies, hot chocolate, and lattes. Enjoy in savory soups and curries, too.

FEEL GOOD FLAVOR: Made with no artificial colors or preservatives, dairy free, gluten free, and non GMO. Feel good about using Evaporated Coconut Milk in dishes that’s served to friends and family who follow a dairy free diet.

important_information.Safety Information: May contain tree nuts (coconut). Ingredients WATER, COCONUT, SODIUM CARBOXYMETHYL CELLULOSE (STABILIZER), GUAR GUM (THICKENER), SUCROSE ESTERS (EMULSFIER), PALM OIL & ARTIFICIAL FLAVOR.

bullets: PREMIUM QUALITY COCONUTS - Our creamy coconut milk is extracted from the pulp of mature coconuts which are ethically sourced from sustainable growers and have passed strict quality control inspections to ensure high quality.

GREAT FOR ASIAN DISHES - A staple ingredient in Thai, Filipino, Indian and other Asian cuisines, the coconut milk will add a rich taste and texture to curries, sauces, and soups. With its sweet taste, it is also a flavorful addition to desserts.

THE HEALTHIER CHOICE - The all natural coconut milk is a great source of protein, carbohydrates, fiber, vitamin C, folate, iron, and magnesium. And because it is lactose-free, coconut milk is also a usual substitute for milk.
ALL NATURAL - Suitable for special diets such as vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free, keto, and lactose free. Our coconut milk also has no added sugar, artificial flavors, and preservatives.
CONTENTS - 6 pack of 400 ml or 13.5 ounces of coconut milk

bullets: THE PERFECT CUP - Create a café-style beverage in an instant, featuring a fresh, mild, and balanced flavor to start off the day or to enjoy at the end of a long one. Notes of caramel, orange blossom, and jasmine.

QUICK & EASY PREPARATION - Preparing illy instant coffee is quick and easy, because two ingredients are enough: coffee and water. It’s recommended to pour two teaspoons of instant coffee into your cup, add non boiling water, mix and taste.

ZERO-DEFECT BEANS - In collaboration with our most dedicated coffee growers, we select only the 1% of the best Arabica coffee beans, perfecting our instant coffee recipes to create the unique illy instant coffee blend.
WE BRING THE TASTE OF ITALY TO - We’ve spent eight decades refining a singular, signature blend celebrated over the world as the pinnacle of what whole bean coffee can be.

SUSTAINABILITY IS OUR VISION - We pride ourselves on the constant focus on our environment and the community. We are part of a global movement with a common goal: to pave the way for a better, more liveable and more enlightened world.

bullets: FRESH, RICH & BALANCED - illy ground moka coffee is an easy-to-prepare morning ritual. Classico, medium roast coffee has a lingering sweetness and delicate notes of caramel, orange blossom, and jasmine.
PREPARE MOKA WITH EASE - Evoke a classic Italian beverage at any time. Coffee is to be freshly prepared and enjoyed immediately. Create the finest coffee experience in the comfort of your home.
SIGNATURE COFFEE - Authentic Italian coffee is flawlessly consistent, smooth, balanced, and never bitter. Small, two-chambered moka pots sit on many Italian stovetops, in a variety of styles.
WE BRING THE TASTE OF ITALY TO YOU - We’ve spent eight decades refining a singular, signature blend of ground coffee - celebrated as the pinnacle of what coffee can be.

SUSTAINABILITY IS OUR VISION - illy believes in sustainable quality and boasts more than 30 years dedicated to perfecting coffee bean growing methods to obtain a harvest that is socially, economically, and environmentally sustainable and responsible.

important_information.Safety Information: This product is labelled to United States standards and may differ from similar products sold elsewhere in its ingredients, labeling and allergen warnings Ingredients 100% Arabica
important_information.Directions: 1. Fill the moka pot with water up to the indicated level. 2. Add freshly ground illy Moka coffee to the filter. 3. Screw the top part of the moka pot on firmly. 4. Place the moka pot on a low to medium heat source. 5. Wait for the coffee to rise into the upper chamber. 6. Remove from heat and serve immediately.

item_details.Flavor: ! I'm so looking forward to baking with gojis -Delicious with ice cream (ben and jerries pistachio, kill me now) when frozen they have a fantastic crunch. -Only purchased one bag so far of this brand and I'm hoping they always come as dry as this bag; I bought truvibe's first and they were not as dry and so even stickier on the teeth and slightly harder to eat imo. cons: -They are delicious on their own as a snack but very sticky on the teeth, look out for sensitive filling, braces etc. -I tried re-hydrating them but ended up composting most of the batch, they're very slimy. -(the big grudge) The nutrition label claims there is around 60g of protein in this 1lb bag, maybe slightly more even, I don't have the bag in front of me. I don't believe that for a freaking second. 60g of protein is a half pound of steak! The FDA DOES NOT APPROVE NUTRITION LABELS! They issue recalls then and if they feel like it. Do your own research! Viva Labs, amend your label!!!!! I estimate that there is closer to 10-20 grams of protein in this 1 pound bag. Viva Labs sent me an email 5 days after I received the product offering to donate $10 to "Vitamin Angels, a non-profit organization dedicated to reducing child mortality worldwide by providing children with essential vitamins and minerals" for every newly posted review (positive or negative I assume). I know nothing about this charity but it seems a fantastic offer if vitamin angels and viva labs do indeed follow through on their promises. I loved the product but probably wouldn't have taken the time out of my day to write as comprehensive as a review of this product, despite the fact that I am enjoying it at this very moment, without this soft of kind hearted offer. Even if that $10 donation is a lie, and I don't believe it is, or if every kid that my own $10 donation goes to dies of starvation despite this effort, I wanted to mention it because I believe it's a beautiful business model and you never know who you might inspire in the unlikeliness of venues. Reviewed in the United States on February 11, 2026 Size: 2 PoundVerified Purchase Best tasting goji berries I have ever tried! My grandmother used to put goji berries in her chicken soup when I was growing up, but I never liked goji berries. Now I'm older, I thought to try it for its health benefits. OMG, these are sooo plump, juicy, and sweet and fun to eat! I'd put them in my morning hot collagen water along with some chia seeds, then I'd add some 100% pomegranate juice. I'd also put them in hotpot or Asian instant noodle soup. You are supposed to soak them in hot water/soup (savory or sweet) before consumption - that's how we eat them. bullets: Organic Goji Berries - Small but mighty, goji berries deliver bright and tangy flavors. Eat them by the handful, add them as a topper to yogurt and smoothies, steep them in hot water for a goji berry tea or add ice for a delicious goji berry juice

Tasty Treat for On-The-Go Snacking - Craving something chewy. Dried goji berries add a tart yet sweet taste to all your favorite snacks. ⁠Substitute mix-ins like chocolate chips or raisins in your salads, trail mix, and snacks

A Delicious Superfood - Not only are our goji berries organic packed with mouthwatering flavor, but our organic goji berries dried are also sources of Iron and vitamin C while being low in saturated fat
Sustainably Sourced Super Grade Goji Berries - Known as the ‘wolfberry’, each organic goji berry is handpicked and naturally shade dried to perfection in the Tibetan plateau of the Himalayas

Quality You Can Trust - Our yummy goji berries are certified USDA Organic, and are Non-GMO Project Verified. And as if that weren’t enough, they’re also certified Paleo, Vegan and Gluten-Free to accommodate a variety of diets and lifestyles

item_details.Flavor: ! I'm so looking forward to baking with gojis -Delicious with ice cream (ben and jerries pistachio, kill me now) when frozen they have a fantastic crunch. -Only purchased one bag so far of this brand and I'm hoping they always come as dry as this bag; I bought truvibe's first and they were not as dry and so even stickier on the teeth and slightly harder to eat imo. cons: -They are delicious on their own as a snack but very sticky on the teeth, look out for sensitive filling, braces etc. -I tried re-hydrating them but ended up composting most of the batch, they're very slimy. -(the big grudge) The nutrition label claims there is around 60g of protein in this 1lb bag, maybe slightly more even, I don't have the bag in front of me. I don't believe that for a freaking second. 60g of protein is a half pound of steak! The FDA DOES NOT APPROVE NUTRITION LABELS! They issue recalls then and if they feel like it. Do your own research! Viva Labs, amend your label!!!!! I estimate that there is closer to 10-20 grams of protein in this 1 pound bag. Viva Labs sent me an email 5 days after I received the product offering to donate $10 to "Vitamin Angels, a non-profit organization dedicated to reducing child mortality worldwide by providing children with essential vitamins and minerals" for every newly posted review (positive or negative I assume). I know nothing about this charity but it seems a fantastic offer if vitamin angels and viva labs do indeed follow through on their promises. I loved the product but probably wouldn't have taken the time out of my day to write as comprehensive as a review of this product, despite the fact that I am enjoying it at this very moment, without this soft of kind hearted offer. Even if that $10 donation is a lie, and I don't believe it is, or if every kid that my own $10 donation goes to dies of starvation despite this effort, I wanted to mention it because I believe it's a beautiful business model and you never know who you might inspire in the unlikeliness of venues. Read more 36 people found this helpful Helpful Report  Gwen 5.0 out of 5 stars  So juicy! Reviewed in the United States on February 11, 2026 Size: 2 PoundVerified Purchase Best tasting goji berries I have ever tried! My grandmother used to put goji berries in her chicken soup when I was growing up, but I never liked goji berries. Now I'm older, I thought to try it for its health benefits. OMG, these are sooo plump, juicy, and sweet and fun to eat! I'd put them in my morning hot collagen water along with some chia seeds, then I'd add some 100% pomegranate juice. I'd also put them in hotpot or Asian instant noodle soup. You are supposed to soak them in hot water/soup (savory or sweet) before consumption - that's how we eat them. Even when eating them dry, they tasted fine like dried fruits. However, poor quality ones that you buy from Chinatown can feel and taste like rocks when you try them without soaking. 9 people found this helpful Helpful Report  Pete 5.0 out of 5 stars  Great bullets: Organic Goji Berries - Small but mighty, goji berries deliver bright and tangy flavors. Eat them by the handful, add them as a topper to yogurt and smoothies, steep them in hot water for a goji berry tea or add ice for a delicious goji berry juice.

Tasty Treat for On-The-Go Snacking - Craving something chewy? Dried goji berries add a tart yet sweet taste to all your favorite snacks. ⁠Substitute mix-ins like chocolate chips or raisins in your salads, trail mix, and snacks.

A Delicious Superfood - Not only are our goji berries organic packed with mouthwatering flavor, but our organic goji berries dried are also sources of Iron and vitamin C while being low in saturated fat.
Sustainably Sourced Super Grade Goji Berries - Known as the ‘wolfberry’, each organic goji berry is handpicked and naturally shade dried to perfection in the Tibetan plateau of the Himalayas.

Quality You Can Trust - Our yummy goji berries are certified USDA Organic, and are Non-GMO Project Verified. And as if that weren’t enough, they’re also certified Paleo, Vegan and Gluten-Free to accommodate a variety of diets and lifestyles.

bullets: RAW AND ORGANIC GOJI BERRIES: Healthworks Goji Berries are just as delicious as they are nutritious. With a soft and chewy texture, our Goji Berries can be added to many recipes or enjoyed on their own. Healthworks Goji Berries are keto-friendly, vegan, non-GMO, and certified organic.

MANY BENEFITS & NUTRIENTS: Goji Berries are one of the most nutrient dense superfood berries on Earth! They are loaded with essential amino acids, vitamins C and A, and high in protein and fiber. Additional vitamins and minerals include, but are not limited to: vitamins B, E and D and minerals such as copper, iron, magnesium, manganese, molybdenum, niacin, phosphorous, and potassium.

HEALTHY ALTERNATIVE & COUNTLESS USES: Healthworks Raw Certified Organic Goji Berries are a perfect addition to smoothies/drinks, cereals, yogurt, oatmeal, baked goods, baking cookies, ice-cream, trail mix, granola bars, coffee/tea, snack foods, or as a nutrient packed substitution for any recipe calling for dried cherries, cranberries or raisins. Raw, Juicing, Vegan, Paleo, Keto, Clean Eating, Wellness, Active, Biohacking, Life Hacking, Yoga, Spiritual, Blending, Non-GMO, Plant Based.

NATURALLY SUN-DRIED: Our Goji Berries go through a natural sun drying process that has been used for thousands of years. We carefully lay out the Goji Berries by hand to ensure even drying as nature intended. This natural process helps enrich the aromatic and flavors of these delicious and nutritious berries.

Reviewed in the United States on April 4, 2022 Verified Purchase UPDATED REVIEW, We have continued to order these leaves. Unfortunately the last jar of leaves were very tough and veiny. Even after simmering for 45 minutes they did not soften to our liking. I'm hesitant to order another large jar. Purchased our first jar after realizing our local grocery stores no longer carry grape leaves. We were a bit hesitant to order such a large glass jar knowing it could break during shipping. It arrived in perfect condition! Leaves are not difficult to remove from the jar. They are wrapped in 4 sections, so you do not need to remove all the leaves at once. Separating the leaves is quite a bit of a struggle due to them being so tender. They can rip quite easily so much patience is required! I rolled ours with ground beef, rice & tomatoes! 2 sections of the jar was enough to fill just over 1 lb of ground beef. I slow simmered the stuffed leaves in a pot for 45 minutes. They turned out absolutely amazing! The most tender and delicious dolmades we have ever had. We turned right around and ordered a second jar to have on hand. This time the jar leaked during shipping. A good bit of the juice had leaked out but not all. We contacted the company to ask if they were safe to use. We got a very quick response (kudos to great customer service)! They responded that they were safe due to preservatives and the fact that the leaves are mostly cooked before packaging. However they insisted on refunding our purchase even though we told them it was not necessary. We ordered a 3rd jar, and it was delivered in perfect condition. We will continue to order this brand! bullets: Effortless & Safe Coconut Opening – No Machete Required: Enjoy fresh coconut water without the hassle or danger of using large knives or machetes. Our coconut opener features a sharp, tapered stainless steel blade that easily drills into young Thai green coconuts in just seconds. Simply push, twist, and remove—no mess, no wasted coconut water. Perfect for beginners, families, and coconut lovers who want a safer, easier method

Heavy-Duty Food Grade Stainless Steel – Built to Last: Each coconut cutter is made from high-quality food-grade stainless steel, ensuring durability, rust resistance, and long-term use. The solid construction makes it tough enough to pierce multiple coconuts without bending or dulling. it's safe for direct contact with food and liquids, and dishwasher safe for effortless cleaning

Ergonomic T-Handle Design – Comfortable & Non-Slip Grip: The specially designed T-shaped handle offers a secure and comfortable grip, even when your hands are wet or slippery. It reduces hand fatigue and provides better control, making the opening process smooth and efficient. Ideal for users of all ages—from first-timers to seasoned coconut fans

Eco-Friendly Reusable Straw Set – Drink in Style: Included in the set are 4 reusable stainless steel drinking straws (2 bent and 2 straight) and a cleaning brush for easy maintenance. Skip the disposable plastics and enjoy your coconut water, smoothies, or juices in a more sustainable and stylish way. The straws are also made of premium stainless steel—safe, durable, and environmentally friendly

Whether you're relaxing at home, heading to the beach, going camping, or throwing a tropical-themed party, this compact and portable coconut opener set is your go-to companion. The straw hole puncher fit easily into your kitchen drawer, picnic basket, or travel bag, allowing you to enjoy fresh coconut water anytime, anywhere

important_information.Safety Information: Please thoroughly chew on the konjac jelly to prevent any harmful choking. Be cautious of injuries when opening the packaging. Do not swallow the cap. Keep the cap out of reach of children. Do not use if cap seal is broken or pouch is damaged or swollen. Do not microwave. For those with allergies or other dietary restrictions, consume after reviewing the ingredients. Precipitation may occur due to the nature of the product, but it is safe to consume. Since the product is sensitive to heat, please keep the product below 86°F (30°C) and avoid direct sunlight. After opening, consume as soon as possible or store in a refrigerator. *These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure or prevent any disease. Ingredients Purified Water, Erythritol, Vegan Collagen Peptide, Mango Flavor, Vitamin C, Konjac Powder, Carrageenan, Trisodium Citrate, Citric Acid Monohydrate, Maltodextrin, Mango Extract, Gellan Gum, Xanthan Gum, Calcium Lactate, Trisodium Citrate, Sucralose
important_information.Directions: Before opening, break down the jelly by squeezing the package with your hands. Squeeze up the jelly to the top and enjoy! Best served cold, but equally enjoyable at room temperature.

bullets: Premium Material & Origin: Select high-quality hawthorn, naturally cored, sliced ,and dried. In this way, the preservation time of the hawthorn becomes longer, and at the same time, our hawthorn is hollow and round, without a stem, which is very convenient to eat directly. The skin is bright red, the flesh is light yellow.

A Variety of Eating Methods: Take 5g of hawthorn slices into a teapot, add an appropriate amount of boiling water, brew for 3-5 minutes, and enjoy. Seedless hawthorn can be better matched with lotus leaf, lemon, rose, chrysanthemum, etc. The taste is sweet and sour, you add some rock sugar, red dates, wolfberry, ginseng, or honey, the taste will be better. Or add some to your porridge and soups, and let its sweet and sour taste stimulate your taste buds

bullets: Top-Grade Material & Anti-Mold Sealed Packaging：Crafted from premium hawthorn with natural seed/stem removal, slicing, and drying processes, our hawthorn slices come in a hollow round shape for ready-to-eat convenience. The strict impurity removal and airtight jar packaging effectively prevent discoloration and mildew, ensuring uniform bright red peel, pale yellow flesh, and long-lasting freshness.

Seedless & Non-Blackening Perfect for Tea & Snacking：Enjoy the sweet and sour, fragrant taste of our seedless dried hawthorn—no bitter seeds or blackened pieces to ruin your experience. It can be directly chewed as a healthy snack or steeped into a flavorful post-meal tea, delivering rich, elegant flavor in every bite and sip.

Digestive-Friendly Herbal Tea with Versatile Blending Options：Brew a handful of hawthorn slices to make a soothing digestion-aiding tea, a perfect natural remedy after heavy meals. Mix it with chrysanthemum, rose, or lotus leaf tea for customized flavor profiles; add honey or rock sugar to taste for a more pleasant, sweetened drink.

Multi-Use Kitchen Staple for Soups, Congee & Baked Goods：More than just a tea ingredient—elevate your home cooking with this tangy twist! Add our dried hawthorn slices to soups, congee, and stews for a hint of sweet-sour flavor, or mix into baked goods for a unique, natural taste boost, making it an essential kitchen star for daily meals and snacks.

Extended Shelf Life with Nutrient & Flavor Locked In：The professional drying technique and sealed packaging not only extend the shelf life of the hawthorn slices but also lock in their original nutrients and fresh flavor. You can stock up without worrying about spoilage, enjoying high-quality dried hawthorn whenever you want for tea or cooking.

item_details.Flavor: Name: Chrysanthemum TeaSize: 3.35OZAmazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) This is my first experience with Chrysanthemum Tea and my first experience with a tea packaged in China. I was a little concerned about a product I was about to consume when the product labels contained significantly contradicting information. The front label states Chrysanthemum Tea and Tai Ju Herbal Tea and the back label states Ingredients: Premium Chrysanthemum Flowers which is consistent with a non-caffeinated herbal tea. The Supplement Facts on the back label states Dahongpao (Camellia sinensis) which is a totally different caffeinated oolong tea. Trying to find more information on this product, I did a search of the "medical equipment co." manufacturer listed on the back label and could not find any information on that company but found information on another medical equipment company from that same town known for their medical equipment but not for tea. I also did a search on the Naslaph brand on the front label and ChatGPT said that it was registered in a trademark application associated with tea and coffee products and the next best step to know what’s actually in that specific package is to check the ingredients list on the box or bag. A full circle back to where I started. It appears that it is not a priority for this vendor of a product you will be consuming to create an accurate product label. So it was now time to open the package to see if it was Chrysanthemum or Da Hong Pao tea. Clearly the package contained beautiful small Chrysanthemum flowers. The front label stated Tai Ju which means Baby Chrysanthemum making a delicate and sweet herbal tea from these young chrysanthemum flowers harvested just before blooming. This tea appears to be a good value compared to other online sources for this type of tea. I followed the brewing instructions which created a wonderfully smooth tasting tea with a subtle sweetness and an aromatic quality of a floral infusion. I enjoyed the tea without any additional sweeteners. My first experience with a Chrysanthemum tea was very good and I will enjoy the remainder of this tea in the future. bullets: Fresh & Clean: This kind of baby chrysanthemum need to be manually picked before the buds are fully open in order to ensure that they are fresh and clean. A complete flower bud can maintain its nutrition and reduce the chance of being polluted.

Supply From Origin: These dried chrysanthemum flowers are from Tongxiang County, Zhejiang Province, which is the famous hometown of chrysanthemum. Each chrysanthemum flower bud is plump and clean, without any fillers or artificial additives.

Healthy Herbal Tea: Chrysanthemum tea is a natural healthy drink, containing rich vitamins and amino acids. It can effectively protect the liver and discharge the accumulated waste in the human body. In addition, it can help protect eyesight, especially for those who need to work with computers for the long term.

Natural Sweetish: After brewing, the tea soup will spread out the gentle aroma of chrysanthemum. It will taste a little sweet but quite smooth, mixed with some honey flavor if savor carefully. Drinking a perfect cup of chrysanthemum tea will be a real relaxation and relief in leisure time.

Interesing Blend: Chrysanthemum tea can be combined with many wonderful things. Want for more sweetness? Just add some honey. A desire for some interesting blends? Try a piece of lemon or a few American ginseng. But a great cup of chrysanthemum tea is the most significant.

important_information.Safety Information: Keep out of reach of young children. Be cautious when handling loose leaf tea. Ingredients Dried Chrysanthemum Flower
important_information.Directions: To brew FullChea Chinese Chrysanthemum Tea, add dried chrysanthemum flowers to hot water. Optionally, add honey for more sweetness or a piece of lemon or a few American ginseng for interesting blends.

important_information.Directions: To cook one cup of hulled barley, add 3 cups of water and bring to a boil. Then simmer for 45-60 minutes. This will yield 3 cups of cooked barley. For a softer texture, use 4 cups water to 1 cup barley; for a firmer texture, use less water. Soaking the barley ahead of time can also speed up cooking.

bullets: DRY BARLEY GRAIN: Goya Barley is a versatile and nutritious ingredient that is essential in many traditional dishes. Carefully selected and packaged, our whole grain barley is known for its chewy texture and nutty flavor, making it a standout in any recipe.

PEARL BARLEY: When you need a reliable ingredient for soups, stews, salads, or grain bowls, Goya Dry Barley Grain is the perfect choice. This whole grain barley is easy to prepare and ready to use, saving you time in the kitchen while delivering authentic flavor and texture.

NUTRITIOUS BARLEY: Goya Dry Barley Grain is a great way to incorporate more fiber and essential nutrients into your diet. It is a healthy and wholesome addition to your meals and a nutritious option you can feel good about eating.

VERSATILE & CONVENIENT: With its chewy texture and nutty flavor, our dry barley grain is a versatile ingredient that can be used in a variety of dishes, from hearty soups and stews to salads, grain bowls, and more. It’s also great for adding a wholesome touch to baked goods. Easily discover new recipes and enjoy traditional favorites with Goya.

GOYA FOODS: Goya Foods remains firm in its goal of being the brand of choice for authentic Latin cuisine while retaining its family-oriented approach to its consumers and its roots in the culinary traditions of Hispanic communities throughout the world. If it's Goya ... it has to be good!

bullets: You'll LOVE our Whole Pearled Barley by Spicy World. Here's why:

bullets: GROWN IN THE USA: Our delicious barley flour is grown right here in the USA and packaged fresh here too! It adds a unique fluffy flavor to your recipes. Perfect for baking, cooking, and more.
VERSATILE GRAIN OPTION: With its fine texture, our product is ideal for creating fluffy bread, hearty pancakes, and flavorful pastries. Experiment with this nutritious grain in your favorite recipes.

NUTRIENT-RICH ALTERNATIVE: Packed with essential vitamins, minerals, and dietary fiber, our Barley Flour offers a wholesome option for those seeking a healthier lifestyle. Enhance your dishes with this nutritious choice.
QUALITY YOU CAN TRUST: Our ground barley is carefully sourced, ensuring it's raw, all-natural, and free from additives.

WHOLE GRAIN BARLEY FLOUR contains gluten, a protein that aids in the rising of baked goods. However, the gluten in barley flour alone may not provide sufficient rising. For optimal results, we recommend combining this flour with wheat flour in your baking recipes

important_information.Directions: Measure 1/4 cup (30g) of Spicy World Barley Flour for each serving. Sift the flour if needed. Use in your favorite recipes, combining with other ingredients as directed. For baking, consider mixing with wheat flour for optimal results.

bullets: REIMAGINE TRADITIONAL RICE: Craft your favorite recipes in a whole new way with our Jasmine brown rice. This fragrant, slightly nutty, sweet rice cooks each grain separately for a slightly chewy texture that works anywhere classic white rice would, especially in Thai, Indian, or Cambodian cuisine.

EASY RICE: Prepare rice according to package directions. On a stovetop, simmer 1 cup of rice in 1 1/2 cups of water with olive oil or salt for 30 minutes or until water absorbs. Or, microwave 2 cups of water and 1 cup of rice on HIGH for 5 min at 50% power for 15 minutes, then let stand for 5 minutes.

TRUSTED VEGAN FOOD: Our classic Jasmine brown bulk rice bag is 100% vegan and vegetarian, but that's not all. It's free from gluten, MSG, and preservatives and verified by the Non-GMO Project. It's even kosher, so you can gather everyone you love around your table!

REWRITE RECIPES: Jasmine rice is commonly used in Thai, Indian, and Cambodian cuisine but also anywhere white rice is used. Craft an easy coconut lime rice dish with meats and vegetables, a restaurant-style meal, rice salad, Mexican chicken and rice, Spanish rice, Indian or Thai curry, or fried rice.

HEART & SOUL OF THE FAMILY TABLE: Mahatma rice is for all who give so much of themselves to provide their families with the best life possible. For close to 100 years, we’ve poured our heart and soul into every bag of quality rice and grains—so you can enjoy it with those you love.

Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes or until all water is absorbed. **Add tub margarine and salt, if desired. For drier rice, use 1/4 cup less water. For moister rice, use 1/4 cup more water.

item_details.Flavor: Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026 Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) I’m a heavy tea drinker and enjoy all sorts of teas. At night, I especially love caffeine-free herbal teas to relax, so I was excited to try this Osmanthus Flower Herbal Tea. Right out of the bag, the aroma is subtle. It has a light peachy, floral fragrance that made me really look forward to the first cup. I also appreciate that it’s naturally caffeine-free, which makes it perfect for evening tea. One thing I noticed right away is that there were no brewing instructions included, so I had to guess on water temperature and steep time. After brewing, the tea turned out to be very delicate—almost too faint to taste. The peachy scent is there, but the actual flavor in the cup is extremely light. I kept hoping it would develop more as it steeped, but it remained quite subtle and difficult to taste. Bottom line: - Subtle peachy floral aroma - Naturally caffeine-free for nighttime tea - Very delicate, faint flavor - No brewing instructions included If you enjoy very light, subtle herbal teas, this Osmanthus Flower Herbal Tea might be a good fit. Personally, I tend to prefer bolder, stronger teas, so the flavor was a little too delicate for my taste. Read more Helpful Report  T. Crumb 5.0 out of 5 stars  Nice floral aroma Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026 Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) This is my first time trying Osmanthus tea, and it was a very pleasant experience. It is a subtle, floral tea which I brewed the same way I brew my other loose leaf non-black teas (steep 3-5 min in slightly below boiling water). It has a very nice aroma and a slightly fruity taste. I like sugar in my tea so I added about half a teaspoon. The listing says you can use this tea as an ingredient for baking, fruit preserves, or cocktail making. bullets: NATURAL AROMA: Harvested before blooming, Olvvla jasmine flowers are dried under advanced low-temperature method. Although some of the aroma will evaporate, you will still smell the natural and mild fragrance of jasmine, without pungent flavor;

CAREFUL SELECTION: We carefully selected 100% natural jasmine flowers as raw material without any artificial additives. They are dried as whole buds to retain their fragrance and nutritions for long. Now you can easily enjoy the full health benefits of this edible jasmine flower;

HEALTH BENEFITS: Whole jasmine bud tea is rich in antioxidants and vitamin C. This tea not only improves the digestive system but also boosts immunity. Besides, the charming fragrance of jasmine can help people improve their mood and enjoy deep relaxation;

EASY TO USE: The food grade dried jasmine buds are placed in a resealable bag to keep them fresh and fragrant. Just put about 1-2 tsp jasmine buds in your cup, add 8 fl.oz of boiling water. Steep for about 3-5 minutes. Enjoy it;

important_information.Directions: 1. Put about 1-2 tsp dried jasmine buds in your cup. 2. Pour 8 fl.oz boiling water. ( About 80-85°C/ 175-185°F) 3. Steep for about 3-5 minutes.

bullets: REFRESHING FLORAL-MINT BLEND: Enjoy jasmine green tea with a smooth mix of peppermint leaf with lightly scented jasmine flavor and natural sweetness from stevia extract, offering a bright refreshing cup that helps reset your senses and adds a soothing moment to your daily routine.

PREMIUM MULTI-BOTANICAL RECIPE: This blend combines oolong, rooibos, yerba mate, guarana, ginger, and stevia extract for layered flavor that supports gentle daily balance, offering a fuller, more satisfying brew than simple jasmine-style teas found in competitor options.

FULL FLAVOR WITH PYRAMID SACHETS: Pyramid sachets let loose-leaf ingredients expand for deeper infusion, helping release richer aroma and smoother taste while providing an easy, mess-free brew that supports a calming break whenever you need a quick reset.

HOT OR ICED FOR ANY MOMENT: Enjoy a warm cup for a steady start or a cool iced brew for refreshing afternoon lift; the floral-mint profile delivers flexible flavor that fits your mood and offers a simple everyday ritual for relaxation or gentle motivation.

CONVENIENT ON-THE-GO TEA BAGS: Individually packed pyramid sachets make it easy to enjoy this floral-mint blend anywhere, giving you a quick, clean way to unwind, stay refreshed, or recharge throughout your day without the hassle of loose-leaf preparation.

important_information.Directions: Add 1 sachet of tea to every 8 fl. oz of hot bottled or filtered water. Steep tea for 3-5 minutes. For best results, drink twice daily.

item_details.Flavor: Reviewed in the United States on March 14, 2026 Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) I’m a heavy tea drinker and enjoy all sorts of teas. At night, I especially love caffeine-free herbal teas to relax, so I was excited to try this Osmanthus Flower Herbal Tea. Right out of the bag, the aroma is subtle. It has a light peachy, floral fragrance that made me really look forward to the first cup. I also appreciate that it’s naturally caffeine-free, which makes it perfect for evening tea. One thing I noticed right away is that there were no brewing instructions included, so I had to guess on water temperature and steep time. After brewing, the tea turned out to be very delicate—almost too faint to taste. The peachy scent is there, but the actual flavor in the cup is extremely light. I kept hoping it would develop more as it steeped, but it remained quite subtle and difficult to taste. Bottom line: - Subtle peachy floral aroma - Naturally caffeine-free for nighttime tea - Very delicate, faint flavor - No brewing instructions included If you enjoy very light, subtle herbal teas, this Osmanthus Flower Herbal Tea might be a good fit. Personally, I tend to prefer bolder, stronger teas, so the flavor was a little too delicate for my taste. Read more Helpful Report  T. Crumb 5.0 out of 5 stars  Nice floral aroma Reviewed in the United States on March 15, 2026 Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) This is my first time trying Osmanthus tea, and it was a very pleasant experience. It is a subtle, floral tea which I brewed the same way I brew my other loose leaf non-black teas (steep 3-5 min in slightly below boiling water). It has a very nice aroma and a slightly fruity taste. I like sugar in my tea so I added about half a teaspoon. The listing says you can use this tea as an ingredient for baking, fruit preserves, or cocktail making. That’s really quite adventurous and I’ve never thought to use tea in that way. But I could see how this flavor could enhance other teas. I am intentionally not commenting on the health implications of the product because I am not a doctor or homeopath so I have no idea whether this tea will “cleanse” you or not. bullets: SOOTHING FLORAL TEA WITH AROMATHERAPEUTIC BENEFITS – osmanthus flower tea is treasured for its delicate, honeyed aroma and calming qualities. Its soothing scent has been used in aromatherapy traditions to promote relaxation, making it a wonderful choice for unwinding after a long day
Osmanthus is deeply woven into tradition, appearing in poetry, art, and festivals. The Mid-Autumn Festival often features osmanthus wine and cake

VERSATILE & CAFFEINE-FREE – enjoy osmanthus tea on its own, blend it with green or white tea, or use it to infuse desserts, syrups, and even cocktails. Caffeine-free and gentle on the system, this floral tea is perfect for sipping throughout the day without disrupting sleep
Osmanthus flowers are blended with green or oolong teas, imparting a honeyed, fruity fragrance.Used in jams, desserts, and syrups for their delicate sweetness.

important_information.Directions: To brew, steep 1 teaspoon of dried osmanthus flowers in 8 ounces of hot water (around 170°F/75°C) for 3-5 minutes. Strain and enjoy. For a stronger flavor, increase the steeping time or use more flowers.

bullets: Grown in the fertile lands of Shandong, China—a region renowned for its pristine environment and mild climate—These hawthorn berries thrive under abundant sunshine and mineral-rich soil. Each hawthorne berry is hand-harvested at peak ripeness. No artificial additives or preservatives interfere with their natural quality.

Crafted from fully matured berries,each slice boasts a 2.5cm diameter and 0.4cm thickness,ensuring a meaty, chewy bite that bursts with tangy-sweet flavor. The uniform size and zero pits/stems make hawthorn berry dried ideal for snacking, drying, or infusing into teas. Using 55–60°C gentle airflow technology, dust-free facilities, we lock in 98% nutrients in hawthorn.

Unlike dull, murky brews from low-grade hawthorn, our hawthorn berry tea steeps into a vibrant light-red infusion, reflecting its natural ripeness and meticulous drying process. Our seedless hawthorn berry offers a smooth, tangy-sweet profile with subtle fruity undertones. Paired with goji berries, hawthorn tea gains a honey-like richness.

Unlike sugary hawthorn strips or hawthorn pills, our hawthorn berry slices do not added sugars, preservatives, or artificial flavors. Perfect for clean-label enthusiasts. Compared to single-purpose hawthorn pills or hawthorn strips. Hawthorn slices has many uses – it can be eaten, brewed into tea, mixed with other herbal tea, or used in baking desserts.

Summer is coming! For a light and abundant fiber snack, try dried hawthorn berries—low in calories and perfect for those with irregular eating habits. These tangy hawthorn berry slices awaken the taste buds naturally. Pair dried hawthorn berries with goji berries, lotus leaves, and tangerine peel for a smooth, refreshing tea with rich nutrients.

bullets: 【Taste and Texture】: dried hawthorn tastes sweet and sour, and the degree of dryness is just right, retaining the nutrition of hawthorn. People who like to eat sour food will definitely like it. The flesh of each piece of hawthorn ring is very thick and full, and there are no additives, so you can eat with more confidence.

【Edible Method】:Our dried hawthorn has been cored and cut into slices, only the middle part of each hawthorn is used. Hawthorn can be eaten directly as a snack, and it can also be mixed with other herbal teas, such as mulberry leaves, roses, etc. When cooking porridge or stewing soup, you can also add some hawthorn for seasoning.

【Suitable for the Crowd】：Suitable for the whole family to eat together, except pregnant women. If you have no appetite when eating, you can take a few slices of hawthorn; or when you feel greasy after eating, you can also take a few slices of hawthorn to eliminate the greasy feeling.

【Preferred Raw Materials】：Select high-quality hawthorns, we only select hawthorn fruits that are full and uniform, and remove the top and bottom of the hawthorn. After removing the core, slicing, drying, and removing impurities, they are packed in sealed jars, which can effectively avoid the problem of product discoloration and mold. The color of each piece of dried hawthorn is uniform and fresh as before.
①Eat directly. ② Brew with water. Usually put an appropriate amount of slices into the cup, add hot water about 80 - 90°C. The amount of hawthorn slices can be adjusted according to personal

bullets: WHAT IS MIRIN: A common ingredient in Japanese cooking is mirin, a type of rice wine. It is comparable to sake but contains more sugar.

Mirin is used in a wide range of foods and culinary preparations, such as marinades, soups, stews, and sauces. In addition to being a crucial component of many traditional dishes like teriyaki, it also gives food a glossy finish. It tastes sweet and acidic in moderation. Mirin is a fantastic ingredient to use in both savory and sweet dishes. It can also be used as a marinade for meats, fish, poultry, and tofu, as well as a salad dressing.

HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS: Our mirin is made with only the highest-quality ingredients. We use premium short-grain rice that is polished to perfection, koji grown using traditional methods. The purest granulated sugar you can find is ours. We only use premium, all-natural that is meticulously harvested. Each granule of our sugar is a symbol of the care and labor that go into every stage of production. It is more than just a sweetener, it is a taste of tradition.

PACKAGED TO PERFECTION: Our mirin is packaged in a beautiful bottle, made of high-quality, BPA-free plastic. The bottle is designed to protect the delicate flavors of our mirin, while also being easy to pour and re-seal for your convenience.
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: Soeos takes your satisfaction as our highest priority. Let us know any time for questions and concerns, as we value your voice to make things right

important_information.Directions: Use 1 tablespoon per serving in marinades, soups, stews, and sauces. Can also be used as a marinade for meats, fish, poultry, and tofu, or as a salad dressing.

bullets: Shaoxing wine (Shaohing, Shaoshing) is one of the most famous varieties of huangjiu, or traditional Chinese wines, fermented from rice.
Shaoxing rice wine adds an unmistakable flavor and fragrance to dishes
Every Chinese restaurant uses Shaoxing wine in almost EVERY savory dish.
Authentic Chinese Cooking Wine, fermented from rice. It originates from the region of Shaoxing, in the Zhejiang province of eastern China.
Ingredients: water, organic rice, organic soy sauce, salt. Contains soybeans and wheat.

HOW TO USE IN COOKING: The most reasonable time to use wine in cooking should be when the temperature in the pot is the highest during the entire cooking process.

item_details.Flavor: (31) Quality(20) Value for money(19) Versatility(14) Ingredients(7) Performance(5) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Rev Scott Fultz 5.0 out of 5 stars  The joy of Mirin Reviewed in the United States on February 3, 2025 Size: 16.9 fl oz (Pack of 2)Verified Purchase Soeos Mirin Japanese Cooking Wine is a fantastic addition to any kitchen, especially for those who love Japanese cuisine. This mirin has a well-balanced sweetness that enhances the umami flavors of dishes without being overpowering. It works beautifully in teriyaki sauces, glazes, and marinades, providing that authentic depth of flavor essential in Japanese cooking. One of the standout features of this mirin is its smooth taste and mild acidity, which helps tenderize proteins while adding a subtle, natural sweetness. Unlike some lower-quality mirin alternatives that taste overly sugary or artificial, Soeos delivers a refined and well-rounded profile. It pairs well with soy sauce and miso, making it a versatile ingredient for a variety of recipes, from stir-fries to broths. The packaging is convenient, with a secure cap that prevents leaks, and the 16.9oz bottle offers a good quantity for regular use without taking up too much pantry space. Additionally, the price point is reasonable, making it an excellent choice for home cooks looking for quality without overspending. A potential downside is that this mirin contains added sugar and salt, so those looking for a more traditional hon-mirin (which naturally ferments to produce sweetness) may prefer another option. However, for most cooking needs, this mirin performs exceptionally well. Overall, Soeos Mirin is a great value product that enhances Japanese dishes with its balanced sweetness and umami depth. Whether you’re a beginner or an experienced cook, this mirin is a solid choice for your pantry. Just wish I didn’t have to buy two Helpful Report  NLT of NM 5.0 out of 5 stars  First Time Means the Best Memories Reviewed in the United States on October 4, 2025 Size: 16.9 fl oz (Pack of 2)Verified Purchase This is my first time buying or even tasting any kind of cooking wine. But a while back I became obsessed with making tamagoyaki. I watched so many videos that used mirino as an ingredient so I had to have it. I spent a few days looking at the Amazon options. Isn't that what we love best - like being a kid in a candy store. Nice labels. Pretty bottles. Interesting names. So many details and then you find just what you have to have. You don't think too much about the fact that you tried to get this brand before and it was out of stock. But you are grinning from ear to ear with excitement because you really really want it. And in a day, it is in your hands. It is definitely a treasure. I opened the bottle after the shrinkwrap while talking to a friend who was telling me I wouldn't get drunk because most of the alcohol burns off. I don't drink so I was a little paranoid, briefly. And when I took a sip... It was amazing. I could smell the ocean breeze and feel the seaweed clinging to my leg and as I knocked it off with my hand, I discovered my hand smelled just like the fresh seaweed. And that is what this mirin smelled like. A very beautiful, clear day at the beach where you can smell and taste a sweet saltiness in the air and life is warm and good. I hesitated, not sure how it would taste but the taste was not what I expected. The saltiness was soft, almost like it was hiding but visible. And the sweet taste was smooth and both subtle and beckoning. And other than that I couldn't describe how it wasn't ice cream or cake or sweet potatoes or chocolate or sugary tastes I know well. I make a simple syrup with ginger root. I made it a long time before I finally reached a taste I couldn't describe but I had needed it before I knew it. It is not harder to give up coffee than it is to imagine my future days without this drink. And I had a similar thought when I tasted this mirin. I thought, what else can I put this in? I make homemade breads , love udon noodles and rice, so there must be something other than tamagoyaki which I never made or tasted. So this afternoon I made my first mirin tamagoyaki! And I am so happy to enjoy the taste of this mirin. I can't compare it to another mirin as I know no other. But if I compare my taste buds now to what they were before, I would say it's similar to the difference in celebrating and rejoicing. bullets: WHAT IS MIRIN: A common ingredient in Japanese cooking is mirin, a type of rice wine. It is comparable to sake but contains more sugar.

Mirin is used in a wide range of foods and culinary preparations, such as marinades, soups, stews, and sauces. In addition to being a crucial component of many traditional dishes like teriyaki, it also gives food a glossy finish. It tastes sweet and acidic in moderation. Mirin is a fantastic ingredient to use in both savory and sweet dishes. It can also be used as a marinade for meats, fish, poultry, and tofu, as well as a salad dressing.

HIGH QUALITY INGREDIENTS: Our mirin is made with only the highest-quality ingredients. We use premium short-grain rice that is polished to perfection, koji grown using traditional methods. The purest granulated sugar you can find is ours. We only use premium, all-natural that is meticulously harvested. Each granule of our sugar is a symbol of the care and labor that go into every stage of production. It is more than just a sweetener, it is a taste of tradition.

PACKAGED TO PERFECTION: Our mirin is packaged in a beautiful bottle, made of high-quality, BPA-free plastic. The bottle is designed to protect the delicate flavors of our mirin, while also being easy to pour and re-seal for your convenience.
SATISFACTION GUARANTEED: Soeos takes your satisfaction as our highest priority. Let us know any time for questions and concerns, as we value your voice to make things right

important_information.Directions: Use in marinades, soups, stews, and sauces. Can also be used as a marinade for meats, fish, poultry, and tofu, as well as a salad dressing.

bullets: Genuine Brewed Rice Vinegar: With depth and richness, this vinegar heightens the flavor of any recipe. Its delicate acidity is versatile and excellent as an addition to Japanese, Chinese, European and American dishes
Gourmet Cooking Ingredient: Our rice vinegars are certified Kosher, Vegan, Gluten Free and Non GMO Project Verified. Try all of our varieties: Seasoned, Unseasoned, Organic, Lite and Original
Finest Ingredients: Our vinegars are made from scratch using select California grown rice and acetic acid bacteria from Japan, where it is delicately cultivated to be used in the fermentation process
Natural Brewed Quality: Our vinegars are slowly and naturally brewed using traditional methods developed over three centuries of experience for a delicate aroma, rich flavor and mild taste
Rich Marukan Tradition: Our rice vinegars are milder yet richer in flavor than any others. They're great for use in salads, seafood, pasta, marinades, stir fry, instant pots, pickling and much more

bullets: Made Within 12 hrs of Harvest: AloeCure USDA Organic Aloe Vera Juice is an all-natural dietary supplement made from inner leaf gel using a proprietary natural process without the use of charcoal filtration, chemicals, enzymes, or fractional distillation. Support your body from the inside out with our Aloe Vera Juice, nourishing your skin while boosting your digestive and immune systems.

Digestive Harmony & Vitality: Fuel your body with the vital nutrients found in our Organic Aloe Vera Juice, boosting your overall wellness and vitality. AloeCure organic aloe vera juice for drinking is 98% inner-gel aloe vera that is never made from concentrate + organic grape extract.

Immune Strength: Boost your body's natural defenses with our Aloe Vera Juice, empowering your immune system. Refresh and hydrate your body with our revitalizing Aloe vera supplement. For best results, take 2oz Aloe Drink refrigerated, twice daily, to help provide full digestive support day and night.

Naturally Processed: AloeCure maintains the maximum natural bioactivity found in Aloe Vera by using only the inner leaf of Gel and a proprietary low temperature process free of chemicals, charcoal filtration, or enzymes to remove aloin. We never use whole leaf aloe or fractionally distill our aloe. Our Aloe is processed on-site and turned into final products within 12 hours of leaving the fields to ensure that we capture the natural power of Aloe Vera in every product we make.

AloeCure: We are family owned and operated Aloe Vera producer. We never outsource Aloe, our primary ingredient, and always process our products on-site in our owned and operated facilities to produce the highest quality organic aloe vera-based products in an ecologically friendly way. Our farms and factory are certified USDA and European Union organic by ECOCERT. AloeCure has over 20 years of working with Aloe providing high quality and affordable products for beauty, health and wellness.

Digestive Harmony & Vitality: Fuel your body with the vital nutrients found in our Organic Aloe Vera Juice, boosting your overall wellness and vitality while combating elevated stomach acidity. Naturally Processed: AloeCure maintains the maximum natural bioactivity found in Aloe Vera by using only the inner leaf of Gel and a proprietary low temperature process free of chemicals, charcoal filtration, or enzymes to remove aloin. Our Aloe is processed on-site and turned into final products within 12 hours of leaving the fields to ensure that we capture the natural power of Aloe Vera in every product we make.

AloeCure: We are family owned and operated Aloe Vera producer. We never outsource Aloe, our primary ingredient, and always process our products on-site in our owned and operated facilities to produce the highest quality organic aloe vera-based products in an ecologically friendly way. AloeCure has over 20 years of working with Aloe providing high quality and affordable products for beauty, health and wellness.

bullets: Variety: nothing beats a perfectly made latte. So rich. So creamy. And now – so easy. item_details.Flavor: Name: Milk TeaSize: 48 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I'm going to be the person that says this was a complete impulse purchase based upon other reviews and what it looked like from the package. I had only heard about this from friends and being in AZ, we have a TON of boba places (at least I think so). My friends rave about boba and milk tea, both available from those places. I have never purchased one because I am not a huge fan of milk nor tea, so it is quite surprising that I would go and buy a 3 pound bag of it. I figure for the price and how much I got, if I really didn't like it, I could give it to a friend to have. Well, I am happy to report I am a convert. This stuff is great! Albeit, a little sweeter than regular stuff my friends have given me to try, but I have a sweet tooth. It's a mix, so it comes in powder and you need to make it in a blender or bullet type mixer. I make mine just with milk and ice, although you can use tea as well (hence the name). It's a great on the go beverage for me and works well with my insulated cup to keep it colder (my preference). My only big gripe with the whole thing is that there is no nutritional label on the bag that is sent. There is one on the Amazon listing here, but nothing on the bag that was sent. Ingredients are listed on the bag, however, incase there are any allergens though. 4 people found this helpful Helpful Report See more reviews Sponsored  Back to top Get to Know Us Careers Amazon Pour into a 16 oz cup filled with ice. **PLEASE NOTE** Scoop not included. Our directions refer to 60cc scoop. 80 grams = 2 scoops OR 1/2 cup **NOTE ABOUT SWEETNESS**: Use less mix or dillute to preference.

bullets: Herbal Tea For Women’s Health : Ginger-Date Tea has been known for “Women’s Tea” for thousands of years, traditionally used for daily cycle support, menstrual cramps and during postpartum to Women’s all stages of life, Ginger offers comforting warmth ,Jujube & Goji berry,Longan provides natural, nourishing sweetness for hormone balance, traditionally used for breastfeeding & lactation

Sourced from Renowned Origins & Gently Processed : We use only pure, natural ingredients: hand-picked Yunnan ginger, Ningxia goji berries, Fujian longan, and Shandong red dates. Using low-temperature drying, we carefully preserve the integrity and rich flavors of these precious herbs. This tea is caffeine-free and contains no GMOs, additives, or artificial ingredients.

A Moment of Comfort for Any Time : *Morning Ritual: Let the natural, spicy warmth of ginger help you start your day feeling centered. *Afternoon Energy: The sweet & spicy ,fruity notes of ginger and jujube(red dates) for a natural lift, *Evening Unwind: Goji berry,longan and jujube dates create a perfect, calming drink for your bedtime routine. *Thoughtful Gift: it's an ideal gift for mothers or anyone prioritizing self-care

Convenient & Enjoyable Daily Ritual : Each resealable package contains 20 individually wrapped bags for freshness and convenience. Enjoy a soothing cup at home, work, or on the go.Simmered ginger and jujube chicken soup is also a good choice

Heritage & Quality You Can Trust : This herbal tea formula is inspired by centuries-old TCM wisdom, including teachings from historical texts like the 《Compendium of Materia Medica》. It is meticulously produced in certified facility, ensuring the highest standards of quality and consistency in every bag

A Deliciously Soothing & Complex Brew : Experience a rich, balanced flavor profile where the spicy notes of ginger meet the sweet, fruity richness of goji, longan, and red dates. Naturally caffeine-free, it's your go-to drink for a comforting, cozy, and mindful moment anytime.

Hassle-free Drinking: Our jujube tea bags are made of natural corn fiber, coupled with state-of-the-art, glue-free ultrasonic sealing technology, ensuring a pristine tea experience. You can enjoy every cup of our tea with peace of mind

Directions Hot serving: 1) Put one pack of tea bag into empty cup. Add 200c.c. boiling water. 2) Steep tea bag for 3-5 mins and stir (using tea spoon to press tea bag) until tea color appear. 3) Add bubble into cup (caution hot after heating) and stir. 4) Enjoy. Cold serving: 1) Put one pack of tea bag into empty cup. Add 100c.c. boiling water. 2) Steep tea bag for 3-5 mins and stir(using tea spoon to press tea bag) until tea color appears. 3)Add bubble into cup(caution hot after heating) and stir. Add 100g ice cubes (the amount can be adjusted according to your personal preference). 4) Enjoy. Heat up instruction for bubble: 1) Microwave serving: Tear along the incision of the bag of bubble (to avoid air expansion) and heat up for 30 seconds at 700W. 2) Hot water heating: Put the complete package into boiling water and heat up for 3 minutes. 3) Caution HOT after heating. important_information.Directions: Hot serving: 1) Put one pack of tea bag into empty cup. Add 200c.c. boiling water. 2) Steep tea bag for 3-5 mins and stir (using tea spoon to press tea bag) until tea color appear. 3) Add bubble into cup (caution hot after heating) and stir. 4) Enjoy. Cold serving: 1) Put one pack of tea bag into empty cup. Add 100c.c. boiling water. 2) Steep tea bag for 3-5 mins and stir(using tea spoon to press tea bag) until tea color appears. 3)Add bubble into cup(caution hot after heating) and stir. Add 100g ice cubes (the amount can be adjusted according to your personal preference). 4) Enjoy. Heat up instruction for bubble: 1) Microwave serving: Tear along the incision of the bag of bubble (to avoid air expansion) and heat up for 30 seconds at 700W. 2) Hot water heating: Put the complete package into boiling water and heat up for 3 minutes. 3) Caution HOT after heating.

bullets: Wholesome Blend of Natural Ingredients：Our Jujube Ginger Tea is a carefully crafted infusion featuring the jujubes, ginger, and goji berries. The plump jujubes bring a naturally sweet, while the ginger adds a spicy, zesty kick. The vibrant goji berries contribute their unique, tangy - sweet flavor, creating a harmonious combination of natural goodness in every cup

Rich, Comforting Flavor：Prepare to be delighted by the rich and comforting taste of our Jujube Ginger Tea. The sweetness of the jujubes and goji berries beautifully balances the warmth of the ginger. The initial sip offers a burst of ginger's spiciness, which gradually gives way to the sweet undertones of the fruits, leaving a pleasant and lingering aftertaste that warms you from the inside out

Versatile for All Occasions：This tea is perfect for any time of the day. Enjoy it in the morning to gently wake up your senses and start your day on a positive note. It also makes for an excellent mid - afternoon pick - me - up, providing a natural energy boost. In the evening, savor it as a relaxing beverage to unwind after a long day. Whether you're at home, in the office, or on - the - go, our Jujube Ginger Tea is a convenient and satisfying choice

Simple Preparation：Brewing our Jujube Ginger Tea is incredibly easy. Simply place one tea bag in a cup and pour 8 - 10 ounces of freshly boiled water over it. Let it steep for 3 - 5 minutes, depending on how strong you like your tea. For an extra - rich flavor, you can even let it steep a bit longer. You can enjoy it plain, or add a touch of honey or lemon to customize the taste according to your preference

Proper Storage for Optimal Quality：To ensure the best quality and flavor of our Jujube Ginger Tea, store it in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep the tea bags in their original, tightly - sealed packaging when not in use. This helps maintain the freshness of the ingredients, ensuring that each cup you make is as delicious and aromatic as the first, allowing you to enjoy the full benefits of this wonderful blend over an extended period

important_information.Directions: Place one tea bag in a cup. Pour 8-10 ounces of freshly boiled water over it. Let it steep for 3-5 minutes.
